# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 4. Feature Flag Catalog

### Search & Discovery

#### `search_v2` вАФ New Search Algorithm
**Default state:** Testing (15%)

The current product search in `productController.getProducts` uses MongoDB `$regex` on the product name field only. `search_v2` replaces this with a hybrid BM25 + TF-IDF ranking pipeline that indexes `name`, `brand`, `category`, and `description`. It also adds fuzzy tolerance for single-character misspellings, so a query for "headphone" still returns "Headphones".

**System impact:** `backend/controllers/productController.js` (new search path), MongoDB text index on Product collection. No frontend changes вАФ the `SearchBox` component sends the same keyword query param.

**Typical rollout:** Start at 5% internal traffic. After one week with no index performance regressions, expand to 25%, then 50% with A/B comparison of zero-result rate, then 100%.

**Dependencies:** None. This is a prerequisite for `semantic_search`.

---

#### `semantic_search` вАФ Semantic Vector Search
**Default state:** Disabled

Extends `search_v2` with embedding-based retrieval. Product embeddings are pre-computed and stored; at query time, the user's search string is embedded and matched by cosine similarity. Dramatically improves discoverability for natural-language queries ("something warm to wear for a hike") that keyword search cannot handle.

**System impact:** New embedding pipeline (background job), vector index on Product collection, extended productController search endpoint. High infrastructure cost вАФ requires GPU or embedding API budget.

**Typical rollout:** Internal only вЖТ 5% beta вЖТ 25% after precision metrics validation.

**Dependencies:** `search_v2` must be `"Enabled"` first. If `search_v2` is still in Testing, semantic search results and keyword results will be inconsistent across user sessions.

---

#### `search_autosuggest` вАФ Search Autocomplete
**Default state:** Testing (25%)

# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 4. Feature Flag Catalog

### Cart

#### `cart_redesign` вАФ Redesigned Cart UI
**Default state:** Testing (10%)

The `CartScreen` currently uses a two-column layout with a separate card for the order summary. The redesigned version uses a sticky sidebar summary, inline quantity spinners (replacing the `<select>` dropdown), animated item removal, and a coupon code input field placeholder. Internal testing shows a 40% reduction in clicks to reach checkout.

**System impact:** React component (`CartScreen.js`) only. No backend changes. Cart state in Redux and localStorage is unchanged.

**Typical rollout:** A/B test at 50/50 for two weeks. Compare conversion rate (cart вЖТ order placed). Promote winner.

**Dependencies:** `save_for_later` depends on this flag.

---

#### `save_for_later` вАФ Save Items for Later
**Default state:** Disabled

Adds a "Save for Later" button next to each cart item. Saved items are persisted to the authenticated user's profile in MongoDB (requires a `savedItems` array field added to `userModel`). Items appear in a separate "Saved for Later" section below the active cart and can be moved back with one click.

**System impact:** `userModel.js` schema extension, new API route `POST /api/users/saved-items`, update to CartScreen UI.

**Typical rollout:** Requires `cart_redesign` to be in Testing or Enabled for UI consistency. Release to authenticated users only. Start at 10% canary.

**Dependencies:** `cart_redesign`.

---

#### `guest_cart_persistence` вАФ Guest Cart Persistence
**Default state:** Enabled (100%)

Cart items for unauthenticated users are already saved to `localStorage` by the Redux cart reducer. This flag controls the additional behavior of restoring the cart on the next browser session (when the user opens a new tab or returns the next day) and displaying a "Welcome back вАФ your cart has been saved" banner.

**System impact:** `cartActions.js` (restore logic), a new `CartRestoreBanner` component. Fully client-side.

# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 4. Feature Flag Catalog

### Checkout

#### `express_checkout` вАФ Express One-Click Checkout
**Default state:** Disabled

Authenticated users who have previously completed an order (so their shipping address is on file) see a "Buy Now" button on `ProductScreen` and `CartScreen`. Clicking it creates the order immediately using the last-used shipping address and payment method, bypassing the four-step checkout flow.

**System impact:** New button component, new `POST /api/orders/express` endpoint in `orderController`, reads last shipping address from user's order history.

**Typical rollout:** High-value change; start with returning customers (segment `returning_customers`) at 5% canary. Monitor for accidental orders and order cancellation rate.

**Dependencies:** `guest_cart_persistence` (for session continuity).

---

#### `multi_step_checkout_v2` вАФ Redesigned Multi-Step Checkout
**Default state:** Testing (20%)

Replaces the current hard redirects between `ShippingScreen вЖТ PaymentScreen вЖТ PlaceOrderScreen` (using `history.push`) with an animated stepper that lives on a single URL. Users can navigate backward without losing entered data. Includes real-time address validation via a third-party API.

**System impact:** New `CheckoutWizard` React component replaces three existing screen components. Router configuration change in `App.js`. No backend changes.

**Typical rollout:** A/B test at 50/50. Measure checkout completion rate and time-to-complete. Target: 15% improvement in completion rate over the 4-week test window.

**Dependencies:** None. Mutually exclusive with `express_checkout` UX вАФ both can be enabled simultaneously but the express flow should take precedence.

---

#### `gift_message` вАФ Gift Message at Checkout
**Default state:** Disabled

An optional textarea on `PlaceOrderScreen` lets the buyer add a personal message (max 280 characters). Stored in the Order document as `giftMessage: String`. Printed on packing slip. Email confirmation includes the message.

# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 4. Feature Flag Catalog

### Payments

#### `paypal_express_buttons` вАФ PayPal Express Checkout Buttons
**Default state:** Enabled (100%)

The PayPal Smart Payment Buttons appear on `CartScreen` and `ProductScreen` (above the fold), allowing users to authorize payment via PayPal without navigating through the shipping and payment form steps. PayPal provides the shipping address from the buyer's account.

**System impact:** PayPal SDK already integrated (`OrderScreen`). This flag controls whether the buttons appear in additional surface areas.

**Typical rollout:** Already fully enabled. Serves as a kill switch вАФ if PayPal has a service incident, set to Disabled immediately.

**Dependencies:** None.

---

#### `apple_pay` вАФ Apple Pay
**Default state:** Disabled

Shows an Apple Pay button on `PaymentScreen` for Safari users on iOS and macOS. Uses the Web Payments Request API. Merchant domain verification must be completed before enabling. Payment processor: Stripe (requires `stripe_alternative` to be in Testing or Enabled).

**System impact:** New `ApplePayButton` React component, backend Stripe payment intent endpoint, merchant identity verification file served at `/.well-known/apple-developer-merchantid-domain-association`.

**Typical rollout:** Enable for `safari_users` and `mobile_ios` segments only. Start at 5%, monitor error rate in Safari console.

**Dependencies:** `stripe_alternative` must be active.

---

#### `stripe_alternative` вАФ Stripe as Alternative Payment Processor
**Default state:** Testing (5%)

The `PaymentScreen` currently has a Stripe radio button that is commented out. This flag enables the Stripe payment path: the user selects Stripe, enters card details in a Stripe Elements form, and payment is confirmed via a backend webhook. Acts as a redundant payment path when PayPal is unavailable.

**System impact:** `PaymentScreen.js` (uncomment + wrap in flag check), new backend route `POST /api/orders/stripe-pay`, Stripe webhook handler.

# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 4. Feature Flag Catalog

### Catalog & Discovery

#### `product_recommendations` вАФ Product Recommendations Engine
**Default state:** Testing (30%)

A "Customers also bought" section appears on `ProductScreen` below the reviews. The initial version uses a simple co-purchase matrix derived from existing orders in MongoDB. Falls back to `getTopProducts` (top-rated) when there is insufficient co-purchase data for a given product.

**System impact:** New backend route `GET /api/products/:id/recommendations`, aggregation query on Order collection, new `RecommendationRow` React component.

**Typical rollout:** A/B test at 30% vs. control. Measure add-to-cart rate and revenue per visit.

**Dependencies:** None. Falls back gracefully to top-rated products, so safe to enable independently.

---

#### `recently_viewed` вАФ Recently Viewed Products
**Default state:** Enabled (100%)

The last 6 product detail pages visited in the current browser session are tracked in `localStorage`. A horizontal scroll row of these products is shown at the bottom of `HomeScreen` and `ProductScreen`.

**System impact:** Fully client-side. New `RecentlyViewedRow` component. No backend changes.

**Typical rollout:** Already fully enabled. Serves as a kill switch for performance or UX regression.

**Dependencies:** None.

---

#### `infinite_scroll` вАФ Infinite Scroll on Product Listing
**Default state:** Disabled

Replaces the `Paginate` component on `HomeScreen` with an `IntersectionObserver`-based infinite loader. When the user scrolls near the bottom of the product grid, the next page is appended. URL query params are updated so deep links remain shareable.

**System impact:** `HomeScreen.js`, removal of `Paginate` component (or conditional render), new `useInfiniteProducts` hook.

**Typical rollout:** Target mobile users first (`targeted_segments: ["mobile"]`). Desktop users generally prefer pagination for navigation control. Start at 10% mobile canary.

**Dependencies:** None.

---

Adds multi-criteria filter panels to order and product list screens: order status, date range, payment method, delivery status, minimum/maximum price, stock level. Filters trigger a debounced API call with query params.

# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 4. Feature Flag Catalog

### Reviews

#### `reviews_moderation` вАФ Admin Review Moderation Queue
**Default state:** Disabled

New reviews submitted via `POST /api/products/:id/reviews` are saved with `status: "pending"` instead of going live immediately. Admins see a moderation queue in the dashboard. Approved reviews become visible; rejected ones trigger an optional notification email.

**System impact:** `reviewSchema` extension (add `status` field), `productController.createProductReview` update, new admin endpoint `PATCH /api/products/:id/reviews/:reviewId/moderate`, new admin UI component.

**Typical rollout:** Enable with `admin_dashboard_v2`. Consider the impact on review velocity вАФ moderate by default adds friction. Start with `targeted_segments: ["admin"]` to validate workflow, then enable globally.

**Dependencies:** None. `photo_reviews` depends on this.

---

#### `photo_reviews` вАФ Photo Attachments in Reviews
**Default state:** Disabled

Customers can attach up to 3 photos when writing a review. Photos upload to the existing `/api/upload` endpoint (which already handles product image uploads). Stored as `images: [String]` in `reviewSchema`. Displayed as a thumbnail gallery in `ProductScreen`.

**System impact:** `reviewSchema` extension, `createProductReview` controller update, updated review form in `ProductScreen.js`, thumbnail gallery component.

**Typical rollout:** Canary at 10% authenticated users. Monitor storage usage and upload success rate.

**Dependencies:** `reviews_moderation` recommended вАФ unmoderated photo content is a risk. If `reviews_moderation` is Disabled, photo_reviews should remain Disabled.

---

#### `verified_purchase_badge` вАФ Verified Purchase Badge
**Default state:** Enabled (100%)

Reviews written by users with a completed, delivered order containing the reviewed product display a "Verified Purchase" badge. The check cross-references the review author's user ID against the Order collection at render time.

**System impact:** `productController.getProductById` (or a new aggregation query), `ProductScreen.js` (badge display in review list).

---

### Performance

#### `image_lazy_loading` вАФ Lazy Loading for Product Images
**Default state:** Enabled (100%)

Native `loading="lazy"` attribute applied to all product images in the `Product` component card and `ProductCarousel`. Low-quality image placeholder (LQIP) technique applies a CSS blur that resolves once the full image loads. Reduces initial page load weight by 60вАУ70% on catalog pages.

**System impact:** `Product.js`, `ProductCarousel.js`, minor CSS additions.

**Typical rollout:** Already fully enabled. Kill switch for browser compatibility regressions.

**Dependencies:** None.

---

#### `code_splitting_optimisation` вАФ Route-Level Code Splitting
**Default state:** Testing (50%)

All screen-level React components are wrapped in `React.lazy()` with `Suspense` fallbacks. Each route loads as a separate webpack chunk. Admin routes, order routes, and auth routes are never downloaded by anonymous users browsing the catalog. Reduces initial JS bundle from ~280 KB to ~90 KB for anonymous users.

**System impact:** `App.js` (import changes), `store.js` (no change), webpack config (no explicit change needed вАФ CRA handles it automatically with dynamic imports).

**Typical rollout:** Technical change with no visible UX difference. Test at 50% to catch any lazy-load edge cases (SSR mismatches, preloading). Promote to 100% after one week of stable metrics.

**Dependencies:** None.

---

Unauthenticated users can complete a purchase without creating an account. A temporary guest session token is issued at checkout entry, associated with the order, and valid for 24 hours. After purchase, the confirmation page prompts account creation pre-filled with the shipping address.

**System impact:** New backend middleware for guest token issuance, `orderModel` extension for guest orders, `CartScreen` checkout button behavior change, post-purchase prompt component.

**Typical rollout:** High-impact change вАФ estimated 15-25% recovery of checkout-abandonment from registration friction. Start at 5% canary for guests. Monitor for order fraud rate and guest-to-registered conversion rate.

**Dependencies:** None.

text:
# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 5. Rollout Strategies

### Canary Deployment

A canary deployment introduces a change to a small percentage of production traffic before full rollout. The name comes from the historical practice of using a canary bird in coal mines to detect toxic gases.

**Standard canary ladder for this project:**

```
5% вЖТ 25% вЖТ 50% вЖТ 100% вЖТ promote to Enabled
```

Each step requires at minimum 48 hours of observation. Metrics to watch: error rate (HTTP 5xx on affected endpoints), p95 latency, conversion rate on the affected flow, and any business metric specific to the feature (e.g., checkout completion rate for `multi_step_checkout_v2`).

**MCP tool sequence for a canary rollout:**

```
1. set_feature_state("search_v2", "Testing")       вЖТ traffic_percentage becomes 10
2. adjust_traffic_rollout("search_v2", 25)          вЖТ after 48h with no regressions
3. adjust_traffic_rollout("search_v2", 50)          вЖТ after another 48h
4. adjust_traffic_rollout("search_v2", 100)         вЖТ soak for 24h
5. set_feature_state("search_v2", "Enabled")        вЖТ lock in the change
```

### A/B Testing

An A/B test compares two experiences to determine which performs better on a defined metric. With feature flags, the test variant is the feature itself; the control is the default experience.

**Setup:**
- Set `status: "Testing"`, `traffic_percentage: 50`, `rollout_strategy: "ab_test"`.
- Define your primary metric (e.g., conversion rate, average order value) before starting.
- Run for a minimum of two weeks to avoid day-of-week bias.
- Use a stats calculator to determine if the difference is significant before declaring a winner.

**After the test:**
- Winner: `set_feature_state` to `"Enabled"`.
- Loser: `set_feature_state` to `"Disabled"`, then schedule the flag for code cleanup.

metadata.title: Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN
metadata.summary: Canary Deployment A canary deployment introduces a change to a small percentage of production traffic before full rollout.

text:
# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 5. Rollout Strategies

### Kill Switch

The kill switch pattern means keeping a fully-deployed feature under a flag that remains Enabled in normal operation but can be disabled instantly without a code deploy.

`paypal_express_buttons`, `recently_viewed`, `verified_purchase_badge`, and `image_lazy_loading` are all currently Enabled and serve as kill switches for their respective subsystems.

**Kill switch activation:**
```
set_feature_state("paypal_express_buttons", "Disabled")
```

This takes effect on the next read of `features.json` вАФ typically within one request cycle if the server is caching with a short TTL, or immediately if reading from disk on every request.

---

text:
# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 6. Best Practices

### Flag Lifecycle and Cleanup Policy

Feature flags have a lifecycle with a mandatory end. Flags that remain in the codebase indefinitely become **flag debt** вАФ they make the code harder to read, harder to test, and they can conflict with each other in unexpected ways.

**The lifecycle:**
1. **Create** the flag in `features.json` with `status: "Disabled"`.
2. **Test** (canary or A/B).
3. **Enable** (promote to 100%).
4. **Clean up** вАФ remove the flag from `features.json` and remove the conditional in code within 30 days of reaching `"Enabled"`. Create a backlog ticket at promotion time.

**Signals that a flag is overdue for cleanup:**
- `status` has been `"Enabled"` for more than 30 days.
- The flag has no `targeted_segments` (meaning it affects everyone equally вАФ there is no reason to keep the conditional).
- No active rollout or A/B test is referencing it.

### Avoiding Flag Dependency Chains

Each dependency listed in a flag's `dependencies` array adds a constraint that must be managed manually. Deep chains вАФ where flag C depends on B, which depends on A вАФ create fragility: disabling A for a hotfix unexpectedly breaks C.

**Rules:**
- Maximum dependency depth: 2 levels (a flag may depend on another flag, but that flag should not itself have dependencies).
- Never create a circular dependency.
- When a flag graduates to `"Enabled"`, its dependents should be updated to remove the dependency reference (because the parent flag is now guaranteed to be on).
- When adding a dependency, document the reason in the `description` field.

### Naming Conventions

- Feature IDs are `snake_case`, lowercase, no hyphens.
- Use a noun-verb or noun-adjective structure: `cart_redesign`, `search_v2`, `photo_reviews`.
- Version suffixes (`_v2`, `_v3`) signal replacement of an existing feature, not an incremental improvement.
- Avoid generic names like `new_feature` or `experiment_1` вАФ the name should be meaningful to someone reading `features.json` six months later.

metadata.title: Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN
metadata.summary: Flag Lifecycle and Cleanup Policy Feature flags have a lifecycle with a mandatory end.

text:
# Feature Flags Specification вАФ ProShop MERN > 6. Best Practices

### Testing Flags in Development

During local development, you should be able to override any flag to any state without touching `features.json`. A common pattern is to check for an environment variable or a query parameter (`?ff_dark_mode=enabled`) that takes precedence over the JSON-based value. This is not implemented in the current spec but is noted here as a natural extension.

When writing unit tests for code that is guarded by a flag, always write tests for both the `Enabled` and `Disabled` paths. Do not assume the flag will always be in its current default state.

### Security Considerations

`features.json` is a configuration file that controls production behavior. In a real system:
- It should not be committed to a public repository if it exposes internal product roadmap information.
- The MCP server that writes it should require authentication вАФ do not expose the write tools publicly.
- Treat `targeted_segments` values as non-secret labels; do not put user-identifiable information in the flag definitions themselves.

---

*Specification version 1.0. Last updated: 2026-04-27.*

text:
# –Р–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј feature flags ProShop MERN вАФ –љ–∞–≤–Є–≥–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ M3 вЖТ M7

> –≠—В–Њ—В –і–Њ–Ї—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В вАФ —Б–њ—Г—В–љ–Є–Ї –Ї `features.json` –Є `feature-flags-spec.md`. –Ч–і–µ—Б—М –љ–µ—В –љ–Њ–≤–Њ–≥–Њ –Ї–Њ–љ—В—А–∞–Ї—В–∞ MCP; –Ј–і–µ—Б—М вАФ –Ї–∞—А—В–∞ 25 —Д–Є—З–µ–є —Б —В—А—Г–і–Њ–Ј–∞—В—А–∞—В–∞–Љ–Є, —А–Њ–ї—М—О –≤ –Ї—Г—А—Б–µ –Є –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В–∞–Љ–Є –љ–∞ –њ—А–Њ—В–Њ—В–Є–њ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ –≤ M4. –Ш—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В—М –Ї–∞–Ї —И–њ–∞—А–≥–∞–ї–Ї—Г –њ—А–Є –≤—Л–±–Њ—А–µ –і–Њ–Љ–∞—И–µ–Ї –Є –њ—А–Є –Њ–±—К—П—Б–љ–µ–љ–Є–Є –І–∞—Б—В—М 1 –Ь3.

- **`features.json` –Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–ї—П–µ–Љ –Ї–∞–Ї –µ—Б—В—М вАФ –≤—Б–µ 25 —Д–Є—З–µ–є.** –†–∞–Ј–љ–Њ–Њ–±—А–∞–Ј–Є–µ —Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б–Њ–≤, —Б—В—А–∞—В–µ–≥–Є–є, –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–µ–є –Є —Б–µ–≥–Љ–µ–љ—В–Њ–≤ –љ—Г–ґ–љ–Њ, —З—В–Њ–±—Л MCP-—Б–µ—А–≤–µ—А –Є–Ј –І–∞—Б—В–Є 1 M3 –≤–∞–ї–Є–і–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–ї—Б—П –љ–∞ —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е –Ї–µ–є—Б–∞—Е. –£—А–µ–Ј–∞–љ–Є–µ –і–Њ 1 —Д–Є—З–Є –Њ–±–µ–і–љ—П–µ—В —В–µ—Б—В–Њ–≤—Л–є –Љ–∞—В–µ—А–Є–∞–ї.
- **–ѓ–Ї–Њ—А–љ–∞—П —Д–Є—З–∞ –Ї—Г—А—Б–∞ (M3 вЖТ M7): `multi_step_checkout_v2`.** –Ъ–Њ–і –±–∞–Ј—Л —Г–ґ–µ –µ—Б—В—М (`frontend/src/components/CheckoutSteps.js`), —Б—В—А–∞—В–µ–≥–Є—П `ab_test`, —В—А–∞—Д–Є–Ї 20% вАФ –Є–і–µ–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞ –њ–Њ–і –≤–µ—Б—М —Б–Ї–≤–Њ–Ј–љ–Њ–є —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞—А–Є–є: M3 (MCP —Д–ї–Є–њ–∞–µ—В —Д–ї–∞–≥), M4 (UI-–і–∞—И–±–Њ—А–і + Figma-—А–µ–і–Є–Ј–∞–є–љ), M5 (n8n-–∞–≥–µ–љ—В —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П–µ—В —А–∞—Б–Ї–∞—В–Ї–Њ–є), M6/M7 (Sentry –ї–Њ–≤–Є—В –Ї–Њ–љ–≤–µ—А—Б–Є–Њ–љ–љ—Л–µ —А–µ–≥—А–µ—Б—Б–Є–Є).
- **–Э–∞ M4 Figma-–њ—А–Њ—В–Њ—В–Є–њ** вАФ —В–Њ–њ-4 –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В–∞: `multi_step_checkout_v2`, `cart_redesign`, `admin_dashboard_v2`, `dark_mode`. –£ –љ–Є—Е —Б–∞–Љ—Л–є –±–Њ–≥–∞—В—Л–є UI-–њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ—А –Є –љ–∞–Є–Љ–µ–љ—М—И–∞—П –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В—М –Њ—В –±—Н–Ї–∞.
- **–Р–љ–Њ–Љ–∞–ї–Є–Є –≤ –і–∞–љ–љ—Л—Е** (4 —И—В.) –Є **—А–∞—Б—Б–Є–љ—Е—А–Њ–љ—Л ¬Ђ—Д–ї–∞–≥ –≤–Ї–ї—О—З—С–љ, –Ї–Њ–і–∞ –љ–µ—В¬ї** (4 —И—В.) вАФ —Н—В–Њ –љ–µ –±–∞–≥–Є –і–∞—В–∞—Б–µ—В–∞, –∞ —А–µ–∞–ї–Є—Б—В–Є—З–љ—Л–µ —Г—З–µ–±–љ—Л–µ –∞—А—В–µ—Д–∞–Ї—В—Л. –Ш—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ–Љ –Є—Е –≤ M4вАУM6 –Ї–∞–Ї –њ–Њ–≤–Њ–і –њ–Њ–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–Є—В—М –њ—А–Њ –і–Є—Б—Ж–Є–њ–ї–Є–љ—Г flag hygiene.

---

# –Р–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј feature flags ProShop MERN вАФ –љ–∞–≤–Є–≥–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ M3 вЖТ M7 > 1. –І—В–Њ —Б—З–Є—В–∞—В—М ¬Ђ–Њ–±—П–Ј–∞—В–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ–є¬ї —Д–Є—З–µ–є –і–ї—П –Ь3 –њ—А–∞–Ї—В–Є–Ї–∞ 1

**`multi_step_checkout_v2`.** –≠—В–Њ —В–∞ —Д–Є—З–∞, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Г—О —Б—В—Г–і–µ–љ—В—Л –Њ–±—П–Ј–∞–љ—Л —Б–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ–Є—В—М –≤ `features.json` –Є –љ–∞ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–є –±—Г–і–µ—В –і–µ–Љ–Њ–љ—Б—В—А–∞—Ж–Є–Њ–љ–љ—Л–є –њ—А–Њ–≥–Њ–љ MCP-—Б–µ—А–≤–µ—А–∞ –≤ –І–∞—Б—В–Є 1.

–Я–Њ—З–µ–Љ—Г –Є–Љ–µ–љ–љ–Њ –Њ–љ–∞:

| –Ъ—А–Є—В–µ—А–Є–є | `multi_step_checkout_v2` | –Р–ї—М—В–µ—А–љ–∞—В–Є–≤—Л |
|---|---|---|
| –Ъ–Њ–і –≤ —А–µ–њ–Њ —Г–ґ–µ –µ—Б—В—М | вЬЕ `CheckoutSteps.js` 4-—И–∞–≥–Њ–≤—Л–є —З–µ–Ї–∞—Г—В –≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤ | `dark_mode` вАФ –љ–µ—В; `cart_redesign` вАФ —З–∞—Б—В–Є—З–љ–Њ |
| –Т–Є–і–Є–Љ—Л–є UX-–Є–Љ–њ–∞–Ї—В | вЬЕ 4 —Н–Ї—А–∞–љ–∞: shipping вЖТ payment вЖТ review вЖТ place | `recently_viewed` вАФ —Г–Ј–Ї–∞—П –њ–Њ–ї–Ї–∞ |
| –Х—Б—В–µ—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ—Л–є A/B (—Б—В—А–∞—В–µ–≥–Є—П `ab_test`) | вЬЕ 50/50 split –љ–∞ –Ї–Њ–љ–≤–µ—А—Б–Є—О | `search_v2` вАФ –Ї–∞–љ–∞—А–µ–є–Ї–∞, –љ–µ A/B |
| –Ъ–Њ–љ–≤–µ—А—Б–Є–Њ–љ–љ–∞—П –Љ–µ—В—А–Є–Ї–∞ –і–ї—П Sentry M6/M7 | вЬЕ checkout error rate, drop-off per step | `image_lazy_loading` вАФ –љ–µ–≤–Є–і–Є–Љ–∞—П |
| –°—Ж–µ–љ–∞—А–Є–є ¬Ђn8n –∞–≥–µ–љ—В –Ї—А—Г—В–Є—В % —В—А–∞—Д–Є–Ї–∞¬ї –≤ M5 | вЬЕ 0 вЖТ 20 вЖТ 50 вЖТ 100 –њ–Њ—И–∞–≥–Њ–≤–Њ | `paypal_express_buttons` вАФ —Г–ґ–µ 100% |
| –С–Њ–≥–∞—В—Л–є Figma-–Љ–∞—В–µ—А–Є–∞–ї –і–ї—П M4 | вЬЕ stepper, –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–µ—Б—Б-–Є–љ–і–Є–Ї–∞—В–Њ—А, –Є–љ–ї–∞–є–љ-–≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П | –±–Њ–ї—М—И–Є–љ—Б—В–≤–Њ –Љ–µ–ї–Ї–Є—Е —Д–Є—З–µ–є –љ–µ –і–∞—О—В |

**–Ч–∞–Љ–µ–љ–∞ –≤ —В–µ—Б—В–Њ–≤–Њ–Љ —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞—А–Є–Є –І–∞—Б—В–Є 1.** –Ґ–µ–Ї—Г—Й–Є–є `homework-spec.md` –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В `search_v2` –≤ –њ—А–Є–Љ–µ—А–µ –њ—А–Њ–Љ–њ—В–∞ вАФ –і–ї—П —Ж–µ–ї–µ–є MCP-—В–µ—Б—В–∞ —Н—В–Њ —А–∞–±–Њ—В–∞–µ—В, –љ–Њ `search_v2` –њ–ї–Њ—Е–Њ –ї–Њ–ґ–Є—В—Б—П –љ–∞ –љ–∞—И –±—Н–Ї–µ–љ–і (–љ—Г–ґ–µ–љ MongoDB text index –Є–ї–Є –≤–љ–µ—И–љ–Є–є –њ–Њ–Є—Б–Ї–Њ–≤–Є–Ї; —Б–Љ. —В–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж—Г). –†–µ–Ї–Њ–Љ–µ–љ–і—Г—О –≤ –і–µ–Љ–Њ –љ–∞ –Ј–∞–љ—П—В–Є–Є –≤–Љ–µ—Б—В–Њ `search_v2` –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞—В—М `multi_step_checkout_v2` вАФ —Н—В–Њ —В–∞ –ґ–µ –Љ–µ—Е–∞–љ–Є–Ї–∞ ¬Ђ–њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А—М / –њ–µ—А–µ–≤–µ–і–Є / –Ј–∞–і–∞–є —В—А–∞—Д–Є–Ї¬ї, –љ–Њ —Б —Д–Є—З–µ–є, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–∞—П –њ–Њ–µ–і–µ—В –≤ M4вАУM7.

---

text:
# –Р–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј feature flags ProShop MERN вАФ –љ–∞–≤–Є–≥–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ M3 вЖТ M7 > 2. –У–ї–Њ—Б—Б–∞—А–Є–є —Б—В—А–∞—В–µ–≥–Є–є —А–∞—Б–Ї–∞—В–Ї–Є

–Т `rollout_strategy` —В—А–Є –Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є—П. –Ю–љ–Є –Э–Х —Б–Є–љ–Њ–љ–Є–Љ—Л —Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б–∞ вАФ —Н—В–Њ –њ—А–Њ *–Ї–∞–Ї* –≤—Л–Ї–∞—В—Л–≤–∞—О—В, –∞ –љ–µ –њ—А–Њ *–≤–Ї–ї—О—З–µ–љ–Њ –ї–Є*.

| `rollout_strategy` | –Я–Њ-—А—Г—Б—Б–Ї–Є | –І—В–Њ –Ј–љ–∞—З–Є—В | –Ъ–Њ–≥–і–∞ –≤—Л–±–Є—А–∞—О—В |
|---|---|---|---|
| `canary` | –Ъ–∞–љ–∞—А–µ–µ—З–љ–∞—П —А–∞—Б–Ї–∞—В–Ї–∞ | –Т–Ї–ї—О—З–∞—О—В –љ–∞ –Љ–∞–ї–µ–љ—М–Ї–Њ–є –≥—А—Г–њ–њ–µ (5вАУ25%), —Б–Љ–Њ—В—А—П—В –Љ–µ—В—А–Є–Ї–Є, —А–∞—Б—И–Є—А—П—О—В –њ–Њ —И–∞–≥–∞–Љ: 5 вЖТ 25 вЖТ 50 вЖТ 100. –Х—Б–ї–Є —З—В–Њ-—В–Њ –ї–Њ–Љ–∞–µ—В—Б—П вАФ –Љ–≥–љ–Њ–≤–µ–љ–љ—Л–є –Њ—В–Ї–∞—В —Д–ї–Є–њ–Њ–Љ —Д–ї–∞–≥–∞, –±–µ–Ј —А–µ–і–µ–њ–ї–Њ—П. –Р–љ–∞–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П: ¬Ђ–Ї–∞–љ–∞—А–µ–є–Ї–∞ –≤ —И–∞—Е—В–µ¬ї вАФ —Б–љ–∞—З–∞–ї–∞ –њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞—О—В –Њ–і–љ–Њ–≥–Њ, —З—В–Њ–±—Л –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–Є—В—М –≤–Њ–Ј–і—Г—Е. | –†–Є—Б–Ї–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–µ–љ–Є—П: –љ–Њ–≤–∞—П –ї–Њ–≥–Є–Ї–∞ –њ–Њ–Є—Б–Ї–∞, –љ–Њ–≤—Л–є –њ–ї–∞—В—С–ґ–љ—Л–є –њ—А–Њ–≤–∞–є–і–µ—А, –њ–µ—А—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞–љ—Б-—Д–Є—З–Є. |
| `ab_test` | A/B-—В–µ—Б—В | –Ґ—А–∞—Д–Є–Ї –і–µ–ї–Є—В—Б—П –љ–∞ –і–≤–µ –≥—А—Г–њ–њ—Л (—З–∞—Б—В–Њ 50/50), –Њ–±–µ –≥—А—Г–њ–њ—Л –≤–Є–і—П—В —А–∞–Ј–љ—Л–µ –≤–µ—А—Б–Є–Є, —Б—А–∞–≤–љ–Є–≤–∞—О—В—Б—П –Љ–µ—В—А–Є–Ї–Є (–Ї–Њ–љ–≤–µ—А—Б–Є—П, AOV, time-on-page). –Я–Њ–±–µ–і–Є—В–µ–ї—М —Г–µ–Ј–ґ–∞–µ—В –≤ `Enabled`, –њ—А–Њ–Є–≥—А–∞–≤—И–Є–є вАФ –≤ `Disabled`. | –У–Є–њ–Њ—В–µ–Ј—Л –њ—А–Њ UX: –Њ–і–љ–Њ—Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—З–љ–∞—П –Ї–Њ—А–Ј–Є–љ–∞ vs –і–≤—Г—Е–Ї–Њ–ї–Њ–љ–Њ—З–љ–∞—П, —Б—В–µ–њ–њ–µ—А vs –ї–Є–љ–µ–є–љ—Л–є —З–µ–Ї–∞—Г—В, —В—С–Љ–љ–∞—П —В–µ–Љ–∞. |
| `full_release` | –Я–Њ–ї–љ—Л–є —А–µ–ї–Є–Ј | –С–Є–љ–∞—А–љ—Л–є –≤—Л–Ї–ї—О—З–∞—В–µ–ї—М: –ї–Є–±–Њ –≤–Ї–ї—О—З–µ–љ–Њ –і–ї—П –≤—Б–µ—Е (100%), –ї–Є–±–Њ –≤—Л–Ї–ї—О—З–µ–љ–Њ. –С–µ–Ј –њ—А–Њ–Љ–µ–ґ—Г—В–Њ—З–љ—Л—Е %. –Ш—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В—Б—П –і–ї—П —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є–є, –≥–і–µ a/b-—В–µ—Б—В –±–µ—Б—Б–Љ—Л—Б–ї–µ–љ–µ–љ –Є–ї–Є —А–∞—Б–Ї–∞—В–Ї–∞ –љ–µ –љ–µ—Б—С—В —А–Є—Б–Ї–∞. | –С—Н–є–і–ґ–Є, –Љ–µ–ї–Ї–Є–µ UI-—Г–ї—Г—З—И–µ–љ–Є—П, lazy-loading, –Њ–њ—Ж–Є–Њ–љ–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–µ –њ–Њ–ї—П —В–Є–њ–∞ ¬Ђ–њ–Њ–і–∞—А–Њ—З–љ–Њ–µ —Б–Њ–Њ–±—Й–µ–љ–Є–µ¬ї. |

**–Т–∞–ґ–љ–Њ:** `traffic_percentage` –Є–Љ–µ–µ—В —А–∞–Ј–љ—Л–є —Б–Љ—Л—Б–ї –њ—А–Є —А–∞–Ј–љ—Л—Е —Б—В—А–∞—В–µ–≥–Є—П—Е:
- `canary` вАФ % —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е —О–Ј–µ—А–Њ–≤, –≤–Є–і—П—Й–Є—Е —Д–Є—З—Г.
- `ab_test` вАФ % —О–Ј–µ—А–Њ–≤ –≤ variant B (–Њ—Б—В–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–µ –≤ A).
- `full_release` вАФ —Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –ї–Є–±–Њ 0, –ї–Є–±–Њ 100; –њ—А–Њ–Љ–µ–ґ—Г—В–Њ—З–љ—Л–µ –Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є—П вАФ –∞–љ–Њ–Љ–∞–ї–Є—П (—Б–Љ. ¬І4).

---

# –Р–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј feature flags ProShop MERN вАФ –љ–∞–≤–Є–≥–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ M3 вЖТ M7 > 3. –Я–Њ–ї–љ–∞—П —В–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞ 25 —Д–Є—З–µ–є

### –†—Г–±—А–Є–Ї–∞ —Б–ї–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ—Б—В–Є 1вАУ10

–£—З–Є—В—Л–≤–∞–µ—В –≤—А–µ–Љ—П —А–∞–Ј—А–∞–±–Њ—В–Ї–Є, –Њ–±—К—С–Љ AI-—В–Њ–Ї–µ–љ–Њ–≤ –љ–∞ reasoning+–≥–µ–љ–µ—А–∞—Ж–Є—О, –Є —Б—В–Њ—А–Њ–љ–љ–Є–µ –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є.

| –С–∞–ї–ї | –І—В–Њ –≤—Е–Њ–і–Є—В | –Я—А–Є–Љ–µ—А—Л |
|---|---|---|
| 1вАУ2 | –Ґ—А–Є–≤–Є–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П –Њ–±—С—А—В–Ї–∞ —Д–ї–∞–≥–∞ + —А–∞—Б—И–Є—А–µ–љ–Є–µ —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г—О—Й–µ–≥–Њ –Ї–Њ–і–∞. 1вАУ2 —З–∞—Б–∞. | `image_lazy_loading`, `paypal_express_buttons`, `guest_cart_persistence` |
| 3вАУ4 | –Ь–∞–ї–Њ–µ UI-–і–Њ–±–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ / –љ–Њ–≤–Њ–µ –њ–Њ–ї–µ –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї–Є / replacement-–Ї–Њ–Љ–њ–Њ–љ–µ–љ—В. 0.5вАУ1 –і–µ–љ—М. | `cart_redesign`, `multi_step_checkout_v2`, `recently_viewed`, `gift_message`, `dark_mode` |

# –Р–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј feature flags ProShop MERN вАФ –љ–∞–≤–Є–≥–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ M3 вЖТ M7 > 5. M4 Figma-–њ—А–Њ—В–Њ—В–Є–њ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ: –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В—Л

–Т M4 –±—Г–і–µ–Љ –і–µ–ї–∞—В—М UI-–њ—А–Њ—В–Њ—В–Є–њ –≤ Figma (–Є–ї–Є –≤ –ї—О–±–Њ–Љ –Є–љ—Б—В—А—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В–µ –љ–∞ –≤—Л–±–Њ—А). –Э–Є–ґ–µ вАФ –Њ—В—Б–Њ—А—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В—Л –њ–Њ —Б–Є–ї–µ UI-–њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ—А–∞ –Є –∞–≤—В–Њ–љ–Њ–Љ–љ–Њ—Б—В–Є –Њ—В –±—Н–Ї–µ–љ–і–∞. –Ґ–Њ–њ-—Г—А–Њ–≤–µ–љ—М вАФ —Н—В–Њ —В–Њ, —З—В–Њ —Е–Њ—А–Њ—И–Њ –≤–Ј—П—В—М –≤ –і–Њ–Љ–∞—И–Ї—Г M4.

### в≠Рв≠Рв≠Р –Ґ–Њ–њ-—Г—А–Њ–≤–µ–љ—М вАФ —Б–Є–ї—М–љ–Њ —А–µ–Ї–Њ–Љ–µ–љ–і—Г—О –і–ї—П M4 –і–Њ–Љ–∞—И–Ї–Є

| –§–Є—З–∞ | –І–µ–Љ —Е–Њ—А–Њ—И–∞ –і–ї—П Figma |
|---|---|
| `multi_step_checkout_v2` | –°—В–µ–њ–њ–µ—А —Б –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–µ—Б—Б-–Є–љ–і–Є–Ї–∞—В–Њ—А–Њ–Љ, –∞–љ–Є–Љ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ –њ–∞–љ–µ–ї–Є, –Є–љ–ї–∞–є–љ-–≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П –∞–і—А–µ—Б–∞. –°–Њ–≤—А–µ–Љ–µ–љ–љ—Л–є UX-–њ–∞—В—В–µ—А–љ, –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ —А–µ—И–µ–љ–Є–є –і–ї—П —А–Є—Б–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П. |
| `cart_redesign` | –Ю–і–љ–Њ–њ–Њ–ї–Њ—Б–љ—Л–є layout, sticky-—Б–∞–є–і–±–∞—А, –∞–љ–Є–Љ–∞—Ж–Є—П —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є—П, –Є–љ–ї–∞–є–љ-—А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ –Ї–Њ–ї–Є—З–µ—Б—В–≤–∞. –С–Њ–≥–∞—В—Л–є UI –Є –њ–Њ–љ—П—В–љ–∞—П –≥–Є–њ–Њ—В–µ–Ј–∞ ¬Ђ-40% –Ї–ї–Є–Ї–Њ–≤ –і–Њ checkout¬ї. |
| `admin_dashboard_v2` | KPI-–Ї–∞—А—В–Њ—З–Ї–Є, –≥—А–∞—Д–Є–Ї–Є, —Д–Є–ї—М—В—А—Л, –µ–і–Є–љ—Л–є —Б–∞–є–і–±–∞—А. –¶–µ–ї–∞—П B2B-–њ–ї–Њ—Б–Ї–Њ—Б—В—М, –Љ–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј–∞—В—М system thinking. |
| `dark_mode` | –Ґ–µ–Љ–Є–Ј–∞—Ж–Є—П –≤—Б–µ–≥–Њ –њ—А–Є–ї–Њ–ґ–µ–љ–Є—П. –£—З–Є—В —А–∞–±–Њ—В–µ —Б CSS variables, —В–Њ–Ї–µ–љ–∞–Љ–Є —Ж–≤–µ—В–∞, –і–Є–Ј–∞–є–љ-—Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ–Њ–є. –•–Њ—А–Њ—И–∞—П –њ—А–∞–Ї—В–Є–Ї–∞ –і–ї—П thinking-in-tokens. |

### в≠Рв≠Р –•–Њ—А–Њ—И–Є–µ –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В—Л вАФ –µ—Б–ї–Є —Е–Њ—З–µ—В—Б—П –њ–Њ–Љ–µ–љ—М—И–µ –њ–ї–Њ—Й–∞–і—М

| –§–Є—З–∞ | –І–µ–Љ —Е–Њ—А–Њ—И–∞ |
|---|---|
| `search_autosuggest` | –Ф—А–Њ–њ-–і–∞—Г–љ —Б –њ–Њ–і—Б–Ї–∞–Ј–Ї–∞–Љ–Є, —Б–µ–≥–Љ–µ–љ—В–∞—Ж–Є—П —А–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В–Њ–≤ (queries vs products), keyboard navigation. |
| `product_recommendations` | –°–µ–Ї—Ж–Є—П ¬ЂCustomers also bought¬ї, –Ї–∞—А—В–Њ—З–Ї–Є, —Б–Ї—А–Њ–ї–ї, fallback-—Б–Њ—Б—В–Њ—П–љ–Є–µ. |
| `save_for_later` | –Ю—В–і–µ–ї—М–љ–∞—П —Б–µ–Ї—Ж–Є—П –≤ –Ї–Њ—А–Ј–Є–љ–µ, –њ–µ—А–µ–Ї–ї—О—З–µ–љ–Є–µ –Љ–µ–ґ–і—Г –∞–Ї—В–Є–≤–љ–Њ–є –Є —Б–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ—С–љ–љ–Њ–є. |
| `photo_reviews` | Multi-file upload, –њ—А–µ–≤—М—О, lightbox-–≥–∞–ї–µ—А–µ—П. |
| `express_checkout` | –Ф–Є–Ј–∞–є–љ ¬Ђ–Њ–і–Є–љ –Ї–ї–Є–Ї¬ї —Б –∞–і—А–µ—Б-–њ–ї–∞—И–Ї–Њ–є –Є –Њ–њ—Ж–Є–µ–є ¬Ђ–Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–Є—В—М¬ї. |
| `reviews_moderation` | –Р–і–Љ–Є–љ-–Њ—З–µ—А–µ–і—М –Љ–Њ–і–µ—А–∞—Ж–Є–Є, —Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б—Л, bulk-actions. |

### в≠Р –°–ї–∞–±—Л–µ –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В—Л вАФ –Љ–µ–ї–Ї–∞—П UI-–њ–ї–Њ—Й–∞–і—М

text:
# –Р–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј feature flags ProShop MERN вАФ –љ–∞–≤–Є–≥–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ M3 вЖТ M7 > 5. M4 Figma-–њ—А–Њ—В–Њ—В–Є–њ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ: –Ї–∞–љ–і–Є–і–∞—В—Л

### вЭМ –Э–µ –і–ї—П Figma вАФ –љ–µ–≤–Є–і–Є–Љ—Л–µ / —З–Є—Б—В–Њ –±—Н–Ї–µ–љ–і

`search_v2`, `semantic_search`, `paypal_express_buttons` (—А–∞—Б—И–Є—А–µ–љ–Є–µ –≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤–Њ–≥–Њ), `apple_pay` (–љ–∞—В–Є–≤–љ–∞—П –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞ –њ–ї–∞—В—Д–Њ—А–Љ—Л), `image_lazy_loading`, `code_splitting_optimisation`, `guest_cart_persistence` (—Д–∞–Ї—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –±–∞–љ–љ–µ—А).

---

1. **`features.json` –Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–Є—В—М –Ї–∞–Ї –µ—Б—В—М, –≤—Б–µ 25 —Д–Є—З–µ–є.** –Э–µ —Б—Е–ї–Њ–њ—Л–≤–∞—В—М. –†–∞–Ј–љ–Њ–Њ–±—А–∞–Ј–Є–µ вАФ —Ж–µ–љ–љ–Њ—Б—В—М –і–ї—П —В–µ—Б—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П MCP –≤ –І–∞—Б—В–Є 1 M3 –Є –і–ї—П —А–∞–Ј–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–Њ–≤ –њ—А–Њ flag hygiene –≤ M5вАУM6.
2. **–Э–∞ –Ь3 –њ—А–∞–Ї—В–Є–Ї–∞ 1 —Д–Њ–Ї—Г—Б–Є—А—Г–є—В–µ—Б—М –љ–∞ `multi_step_checkout_v2`.** –≠—В–Њ —П–Ї–Њ—А–љ–∞—П —Д–Є—З–∞ –Ї—Г—А—Б–∞. –Ч–∞–Љ–µ–љ–Є—В–µ `search_v2` –≤ —В–µ—Б—В–Њ–≤–Њ–Љ –њ—А–Њ–Љ–њ—В–µ –І–∞—Б—В–Є 1 –љ–∞ –љ–µ—С вАФ –±—Г–і–µ—В —З–µ—Б—В–љ–µ–µ –њ–Њ –Њ—В–љ–Њ—И–µ–љ–Є—О –Ї —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–Љ—Г –Ї–Њ–і—Г.
3. **–Э–∞ M4 (Figma) –і–∞–є—В–µ —Б—В—Г–і–µ–љ—В–∞–Љ –≤—Л–±–Њ—А –Є–Ј 4 —В–Њ–њ–Њ–≤.** `multi_step_checkout_v2` вАФ –Њ–±—П–Ј–∞—В–µ–ї—М–љ—Л–є –і–µ–Љ–Њ–љ—Б—В—А–∞—Ж–Є–Њ–љ–љ—Л–є —Н–Ї—А–∞–љ –°–µ—А–≥–µ—П; —Б—В—Г–і–µ–љ—В—Л –≤—Л–±–Є—А–∞—О—В –Є–Ј –Њ—Б—В–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е —В—А—С—Е (`cart_redesign`, `admin_dashboard_v2`, `dark_mode`) —Б–µ–±–µ –і–Њ–Љ–∞—И–Ї—Г.
4. **–Э–∞ M5 (n8n –∞–≥–µ–љ—В) вАФ —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞—А–Є–є –≤–Њ–Ї—А—Г–≥ `multi_step_checkout_v2`:** 0% вЖТ 20% вЖТ 50% вЖТ 100% –њ–Њ —В—А–Є–≥–≥–µ—А–∞–Љ Sentry-–Љ–µ—В—А–Є–Ї.
5. **–Э–∞ M6/M7 (Sentry / observability) вАФ —Д–ї–∞–≥–Є-¬Ђ—А–∞—Б—Б–Є–љ—Е—А–Њ–љ—Л¬ї.** –Я–Њ–Ї–∞–ґ–Є—В–µ 4 –Ї–µ–є—Б–∞ (`recently_viewed`, `verified_purchase_badge`, `image_lazy_loading`, `admin_advanced_filters`) –Ї–∞–Ї —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ—Г—О production-–њ—А–Њ–±–ї–µ–Љ—Г. –£—З–µ–±–љ–∞—П —Ж–µ–ї—М вАФ –љ–∞—Г—З–Є—В—М —Б—В—Г–і–µ–љ—В–Њ–≤ –Љ–Њ–љ–Є—В–Њ—А–Є—В—М –і—А–µ–є—Д ¬Ђ–Ї–Њ–љ—Д–Є–≥ vs –Ї–Њ–і¬ї.
6. **Skip-—Д–Є—З–Є (`search_v2`, `semantic_search`, `apple_pay`, `stripe_alternative`)** –Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–Є—В—М –≤ `features.json`, –љ–Њ –≤ –ґ–Є–≤–Њ–Љ –њ—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В–µ –Є—Е **–љ–µ —А–µ–∞–ї–Є–Ј–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞—В—М**. –Ю–љ–Є –љ—Г–ґ–љ—Л –Ї–∞–Ї –њ—А–Є–Љ–µ—А—Л –≤–љ–µ—И–љ–Є—Е –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–µ–є, –љ–∞ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л—Е MCP-–≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В ¬Ђ—Н—В—Г —Д–Є—З—Г –љ–µ–ї—М–Ј—П –≤–Ї–ї—О—З–Є—В—М, –њ–Њ–Ї–∞ –љ–µ –≤—Л–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ—Л —Г—Б–ї–Њ–≤–Є—П¬ї.

---

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary

**Purpose:** Define key domain, technical, operational, and business terms used in the proshop-mern project.  
**Scope:** All domains covered by M3 curriculum.  
**Update frequency:** As new features are added.

### Customer

A user registered in the system who can browse products, add items to cart, and place orders. Customers have authentication credentials (email/password) and order history. Related: User, Account.

**In proshop:** Stored in MongoDB `users` collection with `isAdmin: false`. Example: john@example.com.

---

### Product

A physical or digital good offered for sale, with a unique price, description, inventory count, and reviews. Products are created and managed by admin users. A product always has a category, brand, and in-stock count.

**In proshop:** `Product` model with fields: `name`, `price`, `countInStock`, `category`, `brand`, `description`, `reviews[]`, `rating`, `numReviews`. Accessible via `/api/products` endpoint.

**Example:**
```json
{
  "_id": "60d5ec49c1234567890abcde",
  "name": "iPhone 15 Pro",
  "price": 999.99,
  "countInStock": 15,
  "category": "Electronics",
  "brand": "Apple",
  "rating": 4.8,
  "numReviews": 42
}
```

---

### Order

A confirmed purchase by a customer containing one or more order items, shipping address, payment method, and totals (tax, shipping, total). Orders track payment status (`isPaid`, `paidAt`) and delivery status (`isDelivered`, `deliveredAt`).

**In proshop:** `Order` model with `user` reference, `orderItems[]`, `shippingAddress`, `paymentMethod`, `totalPrice`, `isPaid`, `isDelivered`. Once an order is placed, inventory is decremented (if implemented).

**Lifecycle:** Created вЖТ Awaiting payment вЖТ Paid вЖТ Shipped вЖТ Delivered.

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Purpose: Define key domain, technical, operational, and business terms used in the proshop-mern project.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Domain Terms (E-Commerce Concepts)

### Order Item

A single line-item in an order, representing one product with a quantity, price at time of purchase, and product reference. Order items are immutable snapshotsвАФif product price changes later, the order item keeps the original price.

**In proshop:** Embedded in `Order.orderItems[]` with fields: `product` (ObjectId ref), `name`, `qty`, `price`, `image`.

**Example:**
```json
{
  "product": "60d5ec49c1234567890abcde",
  "name": "iPhone 15 Pro",
  "qty": 2,
  "price": 999.99,
  "image": "/images/iphone15.jpg"
}
```

---

### Cart

Temporary collection of products selected by a customer but not yet ordered. Carts exist client-side (Redux state) and are not persisted to database in proshop v1. When checkout completes, cart items become order items.

**In proshop:** Managed in Redux (`frontend/src/slices/cartSlice.js`). Has `cartItems[]`, `itemsPrice`, `shippingPrice`, `taxPrice`, `totalPrice`.

---

### Checkout

Multi-step process where customers provide shipping address, payment method, and review before finalizing an order. Typically 2вАУ4 steps depending on design (e.g., Address вЖТ Payment вЖТ Review вЖТ Confirm).

**In proshop:** Implemented as multi-screen flow in `frontend/src/screens/CheckoutScreen.jsx` (or similar). Backend validates order via `/api/orders` POST endpoint.

---

### Review

User-submitted feedback on a product, containing a rating (1вАУ5 stars), comment text, and author (customer). Reviews influence product's aggregate `rating` and `numReviews` count.

**In proshop:** Embedded in `Product.reviews[]` with fields: `rating`, `comment`, `user` (ObjectId ref), `name`, `createdAt`. Submitted via `POST /api/products/:id/reviews`.

---

### Rating

Numeric score (0вАУ5 stars) aggregating all reviews for a product. Calculated as mean of all individual review ratings. Updated when a review is added.

**In proshop:** Stored on product as `rating` (float) and `numReviews` (count). Both updated when new review is created.

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Order Item A single line-item in an order, representing one product with a quantity, price at time of purchase, and product reference.

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Wishlist (Optional) Personal list of products a customer wants to purchase later.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Technical Terms (Implementation Details)

### Express Middleware

Function that intercepts HTTP requests/responses. Middleware can log, authenticate, validate, or transform data before passing to next handler.

**In proshop:** Examples: `protect` (JWT verification), `admin` (role check), `errorHandler` (catch errors).

**Example:**
```javascript
export const protect = async (req, res, next) => {
  const token = req.headers.authorization?.split(' ')[1]
  if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'No token' })
  const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET)
  req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id)
  next()
}
```

---

### REST Endpoint

HTTP endpoint following REST conventions: `GET /api/products` (list), `POST /api/products` (create), `PUT /api/products/:id` (update), `DELETE /api/products/:id` (delete).

**In proshop:** All routes follow REST:
- `GET /api/products` вЖТ list all products.
- `GET /api/products/:id` вЖТ get one product.
- `POST /api/orders` вЖТ create order.
- `PUT /api/orders/:id/pay` вЖТ mark order as paid.

---

### ObjectId

MongoDB's native unique identifier format (12-byte hex string like `"60d5ec49c1234567890abcde"`). Used as primary key for every document.

**In proshop:** Every document has `_id` field (ObjectId). Foreign keys use ObjectId refs. Example: `Order.user` = ObjectId of the customer.

---

### Virtual Field

Mongoose computed field not stored in database. Calculated on-the-fly from other fields. Useful for derived data.

**In proshop:** Could add virtual like `product.totalReviewScore = reviews.length * avgRating` (not stored, computed when accessed).

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Express Middleware Function that intercepts HTTP requests/responses.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Operations & Deployment Terms

### Feature Flag

Boolean or percentage-based toggle that enables/disables code path without redeployment. Used for canary deployments, A/B testing, and emergency kill switches.

**In proshop:** Example flag `new_search_filter` with `enabled: true/false` and optional `rolloutPercentage: 0вАУ100`. Checked at runtime in controller:
```javascript
if (featureFlags.new_search_filter?.enabled) {
  // new code path
} else {
  // old code path
}
```

**Use case:** Safely roll out checkout redesign to 5% of users, monitor, expand to 100%.

---

### Canary Deployment

Gradual rollout of new code to subset of users (5% вЖТ 25% вЖТ 50% вЖТ 100%) to catch bugs early without affecting all users.

**In proshop:** Implemented via feature flag's `rolloutPercentage`. Start at 5% for 1вАУ2 hours, watch metrics, expand if stable.

---

### Rollback

Revert to previous code version (git revert or Heroku release rollback). Fastest way to stop a broken deploy from harming users.

**In proshop:** `heroku releases:rollback v20` reverts to release 20 in <1 minute. No code change needed.

**When to use:** Incident detected within 5 minutes of deploy.

---

### Blue-Green Deployment

Strategy where two identical production environments (blue=current, green=new) run in parallel. Switch traffic from blue to green once green is verified. Allows instant rollback.

**In proshop:** Not currently implemented (Heroku doesn't natively support blue-green). Could be added with load balancer + multiple dynos.

---

### Health Check

Simple endpoint or query to verify service is running and responsive. Used for monitoring and automated restarts.

**In proshop:** Could implement `GET /api/health` returning `{ status: "OK", uptime: 3600 }`. Monitored every 30 seconds.

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Feature Flag Boolean or percentage-based toggle that enables/disables code path without redeployment.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Operations & Deployment Terms

### Dead Letter Queue (DLQ)

Message queue for failed/unprocessable messages. Prevents infinite retries of bad data and preserves data for analysis.

**In proshop:** Not currently used. If emails fail, they could go to DLQ instead of being retried infinitely.

**Concept:** Order confirmation email fails вЖТ message moved to DLQ вЖТ manual review later.

---

### SLA (Service Level Agreement)

Commitment to uptime/performance. Example: "99.9% uptime" = max 43 minutes downtime/month.

**In proshop:** Hypothetical SLA: 99% uptime, P95 latency < 1 second, checkout success rate > 99.5%.

---

### SLO (Service Level Objective)

Internal target stricter than SLA. Example: SLA is 99% uptime; SLO is 99.5% (buffer for incidents).

**In proshop:** SLO: 99.5% uptime, P99 latency < 2 seconds (more aggressive than SLA to catch issues early).

---

### P95 Latency

Response time where 95% of requests complete faster. Measures typical user experience (ignores slow outliers).

**In proshop:** "P95 latency is 800ms" = 95% of requests complete in <800ms, 5% take longer. If P95 suddenly spikes to 5000ms, incident likely.

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) Message queue for failed/unprocessable messages.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Business & Metrics Terms

### AOV (Average Order Value)

Total revenue divided by number of orders. Indicator of purchase size and monetization.

**In proshop:** If 1000 orders totaled $45,000, AOV = $45. Goal: increase AOV through upsells, bundles, etc.

**Formula:** `AOV = Total Revenue / Total Orders`

---

### GMV (Gross Merchandise Value)

Total value of orders placed (before refunds, cancellations). Gross measure of platform activity.

**In proshop:** If 1000 orders placed with AOV $45, GMV = $45,000. Higher GMV = healthier business.

**Formula:** `GMV = Number of Orders √Ч Average Order Value`

---

### Conversion Rate

Percentage of visitors who complete a purchase. Critical metric for e-commerce health.

**In proshop:** If 10,000 users visit, 300 place orders, conversion rate = 3%. Industry avg: 1вАУ3%.

**Formula:** `Conversion Rate = Orders / Visitors √Ч 100%`

---

### Cart Abandonment Rate

Percentage of shopping carts created but not converted to orders. Indicates friction in checkout.

**In proshop:** If 5000 carts created but only 1500 complete checkout, abandonment = 70%. High abandonment suggests checkout is too complex or too many payment options failing.

**Formula:** `Cart Abandonment = (Carts Created - Orders Completed) / Carts Created √Ч 100%`

---

### Repeat Purchase Rate

Percentage of customers who buy more than once. Indicator of customer satisfaction and retention.

**In proshop:** If 1000 customers exist and 200 placed 2+ orders, repeat rate = 20%. Goal: >30% indicates healthy business.

**Formula:** `Repeat Rate = Repeat Customers / Total Customers √Ч 100%`

---

### NPS (Net Promoter Score)

Survey metric measuring customer loyalty. Customers rate "likelihood to recommend" 0вАУ10. Detractors (0вАУ6) subtract from Promoters (9вАУ10).

**In proshop:** Could add post-checkout survey. Example: 50% Promoters, 10% Detractors = NPS = 40. Target: >50 is healthy.

**Formula:** `NPS = % Promoters - % Detractors`

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: AOV (Average Order Value) Total revenue divided by number of orders.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Business & Metrics Terms

### Churn Rate

Percentage of customers who stop using service in a period. Opposite of retention.

**In proshop:** If 1000 active customers last month, 50 never return, churn = 5%. High churn = problem with product/service.

**Formula:** `Churn = Lost Customers / Starting Customers √Ч 100%`

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Churn Rate Percentage of customers who stop using service in a period.

text:
# ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary > Cross-Cutting Reference

### Environment Variables

Configuration passed at runtime (not hardcoded). Examples: `NODE_ENV`, `MONGO_URI`, `JWT_SECRET`, `PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID`.

**In proshop:** Stored in `.env` (local) or Heroku config vars (production). Always `.env` is gitignored for security.

---

### Node.js

JavaScript runtime for server-side code. Allows JavaScript to run outside browser. Event-driven, non-blocking I/O.

**In proshop:** Backend runs on Node.js v14+. `npm start` launches Node.js process running `backend/server.js`.

---

### npm (Node Package Manager)

JavaScript package manager. `npm install` pulls dependencies from registry. `package.json` lists all dependencies.

**In proshop:** `npm install` downloads 50+ packages (express, mongoose, bcryptjs, etc.).

---

### Docker

Containerization platform. `docker compose up` starts containers (MongoDB) without installing MongoDB locally.

**In proshop:** `npm run mongo:up` = `docker compose up -d mongo` = starts MongoDB in isolated container. Same image everywhere (dev, staging, prod).

---

### Heroku

Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) for hosting Node.js/Python/Go apps. Handles deployment, scaling, and infrastructure.

**In proshop:** `git push heroku main` deploys code. Heroku builds Docker image, runs `npm install`, executes `heroku-postbuild` script, starts dyno.

---

### Idempotent

Operation that produces same result if run multiple times. Safe to retry.

**In proshop:** `npm run data:import` is idempotentвАФrunning twice is safe (seed script deletes then recreates data). Non-idempotent: `POST /api/orders` without checkвАФrunning twice creates 2 orders.

---

### Atomicity

Database guarantee that operation completes fully or not at all. No partial updates.

**In proshop:** If order creation involves: 1) create order, 2) decrement inventory, 3) charge payment, all three must succeed or all rollback. MongoDB transactions ensure atomicity.

---

metadata.title: ProShop MERN E-Commerce Glossary
metadata.summary: Environment Variables Configuration passed at runtime (not hardcoded).

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 1: Admin Navigation & Role Gating

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–£—Б–ї–Њ–≤–љ–Њ–µ –Њ—В–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є–µ admin-–Љ–µ–љ—О –≤ —Е–µ–і–µ—А–µ –Є –Ј–∞—Й–Є—В–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е admin-–Љ–∞—А—И—А—Г—В–Њ–≤ –Њ—В –Њ–±—Л—З–љ—Л—Е –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї–µ–є. Persona: —Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ–љ—Л–є –∞–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А –Љ–∞–≥–∞–Ј–Є–љ–∞.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Component:** `Header.js` вАФ —Г—Б–ї–Њ–≤–љ—Л–є —А–µ–љ–і–µ—А:
  ```jsx
  {userInfo && userInfo.isAdmin && (
    <NavDropdown title='Admin' id='adminmenu'>
      <LinkContainer to='/admin/userlist'><NavDropdown.Item>Users</NavDropdown.Item></LinkContainer>
      <LinkContainer to='/admin/productlist'><NavDropdown.Item>Products</NavDropdown.Item></LinkContainer>
      <LinkContainer to='/admin/orderlist'><NavDropdown.Item>Orders</NavDropdown.Item></LinkContainer>
    </NavDropdown>
  )}
  ```
- **Backend guard:** middleware chain `protect, admin` –љ–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е admin-—А–Њ—Г—В–∞—Е:
  - `admin` middleware: `if (req.user && req.user.isAdmin) { next() } else { res.status(401) throw new Error('Not authorized as an admin') }`
- **Frontend guard:** –Ї–∞–ґ–і—Л–є admin screen –≤ `useEffect`:
  ```js
  if (!userInfo || !userInfo.isAdmin) { history.push('/login') }
  ```
- **`isAdmin` –њ–Њ–ї–µ:** —Е—А–∞–љ–Є—В—Б—П –≤ User model (default: `false`), –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В—Б—П –≤ JWT payload –Ї–∞–Ї —З–∞—Б—В—М userInfo.

### API endpoints

- Admin-–Љ–µ–љ—О –љ–µ –і–µ–ї–∞–µ—В API-–Ј–∞–њ—А–Њ—Б–Њ–≤. –Т–Є–і–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В—М –Њ–њ—А–µ–і–µ–ї—П–µ—В—Б—П `userInfo.isAdmin` –Є–Ј Redux state.

### Edge cases

- –Я–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М –Ј–љ–∞–µ—В URL admin-—Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Л вЖТ frontend guard —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В–Є—В –љ–∞ `/login`.
- –Я—А—П–Љ–Њ–є API-–Ј–∞–њ—А–Њ—Б —Б —В–Њ–Ї–µ–љ–Њ–Љ –љ–µ-admin –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П вЖТ `admin` middleware –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В HTTP 401.
- `userInfo.isAdmin` –≤ Redux –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –±—Л—В—М —Г—Б—В–∞—А–µ–≤—И–Є–Љ –µ—Б–ї–Є admin-—Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–Є–ї–Є –і—А—Г–≥–Є–Љ —Б–µ—Б—Б–Є–µ–є вЖТ —А–µ—И–∞–µ—В—Б—П logout/login.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Auth (JWT, `isAdmin` –њ–Њ–ї–µ), User model.
- –Т—Б–µ admin features –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б—П—В –Њ—В —Н—В–Њ–≥–Њ –≥–µ–є—В–Є–љ–≥–∞.

---

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 2: Admin Product List

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–Њ–≤ —Б –≤–Њ–Ј–Љ–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ—Б—В—М—О —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П –Є —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є—П –Ї–∞–ґ–і–Њ–≥–Њ, –∞ —В–∞–Ї–ґ–µ –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є—П –љ–Њ–≤–Њ–≥–Њ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞. Persona: –Ї–Њ–љ—В–µ–љ—В-–Љ–µ–љ–µ–і–ґ–µ—А, —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П—О—Й–Є–є –∞—Б—Б–Њ—А—В–Є–Љ–µ–љ—В–Њ–Љ.

### User flow

1. Admin –Њ—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `/admin/productlist` (–Є–Ј –Љ–µ–љ—О Admin вЖТ Products).
2. –Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞: ID, NAME, PRICE, CATEGORY, BRAND, –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–Є Edit/Delete.
3. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї ¬ЂEdit¬ї вЖТ `/admin/product/:id/edit`.
4. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї ¬ЂDelete¬ї вЖТ `window.confirm('Are you sure')` вЖТ —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ.
5. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї ¬ЂCreate Product¬ї вЖТ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞—С—В—Б—П product —Б –і–µ—Д–Њ–ї—В–љ—Л–Љ–Є –Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є—П–Љ–Є вЖТ —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В –љ–∞ —Д–Њ—А–Љ—Г —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П.
6. –Я–∞–≥–Є–љ–∞—Ж–Є—П –њ–Њ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж–∞–Љ.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `ProductListScreen.js` вАФ —З–Є—В–∞–µ—В `match.params.pageNumber`.
- **Actions:**
  - `listProducts('', pageNumber)` вАФ GET `/api/products?pageNumber=N` (–њ—Г—Б—В–Њ–є keyword вАФ –≤—Б–µ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А—Л).
  - `deleteProduct(id)` вАФ DELETE `/api/products/:id`.
  - `createProduct()` вАФ POST `/api/products` (–±–µ–Ј body).
- **Reducers:** `productListReducer`, `productDeleteReducer`, `productCreateReducer`.
- **`useEffect` –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є:** `successDelete`, `successCreate` вАФ –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В —Б–њ–Є—Б–Њ–Ї –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—Ж–Є–є.
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ `successCreate` вЖТ `history.push('/admin/product/${createdProduct._id}/edit')`.
- `PRODUCT_CREATE_RESET` –і–Є—Б–њ–∞—В—З–Є—В—Б—П –њ—А–Є –≤—Е–Њ–і–µ –љ–∞ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Г.

### API endpoints

- `GET /api/products?pageNumber=N` вАФ public (–Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В—Б—П –±–µ–Ј auth).
- `DELETE /api/products/:id` вАФ private + admin, response: `{ message: 'Product removed' }`.
- `POST /api/products` вАФ private + admin, response: —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–љ—Л–є product, HTTP 201.

### Edge cases

- –£–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ —Б `window.confirm` вАФ –љ–µ—В undo. –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ `successDelete` —Б–њ–Є—Б–Њ–Ї –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–∞—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В—Б—П.
- –Ю—И–Є–±–Ї–∞ —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є—П (`errorDelete`) вЖТ `<Message variant='danger'>` –љ–∞–і —В–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–µ–є.
- –°–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–µ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞ –њ—А–Є –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–µ (`errorCreate`) вЖТ `<Message variant='danger'>`.
- `listProducts` –±–µ–Ј keyword –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В —В—Г –ґ–µ —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—О —З—В–Њ –Є –њ—Г–±–ї–Є—З–љ—Л–є –Ї–∞—В–∞–ї–Њ–≥ вАФ admin –≤–Є–і–Є—В –≤—Б–µ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А—Л.
- –Я–∞–≥–Є–љ–∞—Ж–Є—П admin –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В URL `/admin/productlist/:pageNumber` (–Њ—В–ї–Є—З–∞–µ—В—Б—П –Њ—В user URL).

# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 2: Admin Product List > –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Product model, Auth + admin middleware, Paginate component.
- –Ю—В —Н—В–Њ–є —Д–Є—З–Є –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б—П—В: Product Edit (–њ–µ—А–µ—Е–Њ–і —З–µ—А–µ–Ј Edit button), Product Create (–њ–µ—А–µ—Е–Њ–і –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є—П).

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 3: Admin Product Create (Sample Product)

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–С—Л—Б—В—А–Њ–µ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–µ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞-–Ј–∞–≥–ї—Г—И–Ї–Є —Б –і–µ—Д–Њ–ї—В–љ—Л–Љ–Є –Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є—П–Љ–Є. –°—А–∞–Ј—Г –Њ—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П —Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞ —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П –і–ї—П –Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–Є—П —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–Љ–Є –і–∞–љ–љ—Л–Љ–Є. Persona: –Ї–Њ–љ—В–µ–љ—В-–Љ–µ–љ–µ–і–ґ–µ—А, –і–Њ–±–∞–≤–ї—П—О—Й–Є–є –љ–Њ–≤—Л–є —В–Њ–≤–∞—А.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Action:** `createProduct()` вАФ POST `/api/products` —Б –њ—Г—Б—В—Л–Љ body `{}`.
- **Controller:** —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞—С—В —Д–Є–Ї—Б–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–є –Њ–±—К–µ–Ї—В:
  ```js
  const product = new Product({
    name: 'Sample name',
    price: 0,
    user: req.user._id,
    image: '/images/sample.jpg',
    brand: 'Sample brand',
    category: 'Sample category',
    countInStock: 0,
    numReviews: 0,
    description: 'Sample description',
  })
  ```
- `user` –њ–Њ–ї–µ вЖТ ID —В–µ–Ї—Г—Й–µ–≥–Њ admin-–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П.
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є—П вЖТ –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–∞—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є –њ–µ—А–µ—Е–Њ–і –љ–∞ `ProductEditScreen` –і–ї—П –Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–Є—П.

### API endpoints

- `POST /api/products` вАФ private + admin, body: `{}`, response: product —Б –і–µ—Д–Њ–ї—В–љ—Л–Љ–Є –Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є—П–Љ–Є, HTTP 201.

### Edge cases

- –Х—Б–ї–Є admin –љ–µ –Ј–∞–≤–µ—А—И–∞–µ—В —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ вЖТ –≤ –С–Ф –Њ—Б—В–∞—С—В—Б—П "Sample" —В–Њ–≤–∞—А —Б –љ—Г–ї–µ–≤–Њ–є —Ж–µ–љ–Њ–є.
- –Э–µ—В –≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є–Є –љ–∞ —Г–љ–Є–Ї–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ—Б—В—М –Є–Љ–µ–љ–Є вАФ –Љ–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞—В—М –љ–µ—Б–Ї–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –Њ–і–Є–љ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤—Л—Е "Sample name".
- `countInStock: 0` вЖТ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А —Б—А–∞–Ј—Г "Out Of Stock" –≤ –њ—Г–±–ї–Є—З–љ–Њ–Љ –Ї–∞—В–∞–ї–Њ–≥–µ.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Product model, admin auth.
- –Э–µ–Љ–µ–і–ї–µ–љ–љ–Њ –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–µ—В: Product Edit flow (Feature 4).

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 4: Admin Product Edit

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–§–Њ—А–Љ–∞ —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г—О—Й–µ–≥–Њ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞: –Є–Љ—П, —Ж–µ–љ–∞, –Є–Ј–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є–µ (URL –Є–ї–Є upload), brand, category, countInStock, description. Persona: –Ї–Њ–љ—В–µ–љ—В-–Љ–µ–љ–µ–і–ґ–µ—А.

### User flow

1. –Ю—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `/admin/product/:id/edit`.
2. –§–Њ—А–Љ–∞ –њ—А–µ–і–Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–∞ —В–µ–Ї—Г—Й–Є–Љ–Є –і–∞–љ–љ—Л–Љ–Є —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞.
3. –Ь–µ–љ—П–µ—В –њ–Њ–ї—П.
4. –Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–ґ–∞–µ—В –Є–Ј–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є–µ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј file picker (–Є–ї–Є –≤–≤–Њ–і–Є—В URL –≤—А—Г—З–љ—Г—О).
5. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ—В ¬ЂUpdate¬ї.
6. –Я—А–Є —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–µ вЖТ —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В –љ–∞ `/admin/productlist`.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `ProductEditScreen.js` вАФ 7 state –њ–µ—А–µ–Љ–µ–љ–љ—Л—Е + `uploading`.
- **Actions:**
  - `listProductDetails(productId)` вАФ GET `/api/products/:id` –і–ї—П –њ—А–µ–і–Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–Є—П.
  - `updateProduct({ _id, name, price, image, brand, category, description, countInStock })` вАФ PUT `/api/products/:id`.
- **File Upload:** `uploadFileHandler` вАФ –њ—А—П–Љ–Њ–є `axios.post('/api/upload', formData)` (–љ–µ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј Redux action):
  ```js
  const config = {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
      Authorization: userInfo ? `Bearer ${userInfo.token}` : undefined
    }
  }
  const { data } = await axios.post('/api/upload', formData, config)
  setImage(data) // —Б–µ—А–≤–µ—А –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В –њ—Г—В—М –Ї —Д–∞–є–ї—Г
  ```
- **–Т–∞–ґ–љ–Њ:** —В–Њ–Ї–µ–љ –±–µ—А—С—В—Б—П –љ–∞–њ—А—П–Љ—Г—О –Є–Ј `store.getState()` –≤–љ—Г—В—А–Є handler (–љ–µ –Є–Ј useSelector) вАФ –љ–µ—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞—А—В–љ—Л–є –њ–∞—В—В–µ—А–љ.
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ `successUpdate` вЖТ `PRODUCT_UPDATE_RESET` + redirect.

### API endpoints

- `GET /api/products/:id` вАФ public.
- `PUT /api/products/:id` вАФ private + admin, body: –≤—Б–µ –њ–Њ–ї—П —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞, response: –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—С–љ–љ—Л–є product.
- `POST /api/upload` вАФ private + admin, multipart/form-data, response: –њ—Г—В—М –Ї —Д–∞–є–ї—Г (—Б—В—А–Њ–Ї–∞).

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 4: Admin Product Edit

### Edge cases

- –Я–Њ–ї—П —Д–Њ—А–Љ—Л –љ–µ –Є–Љ–µ—О—В min/max –≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є–Є вАФ price –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –±—Л—В—М –Њ—В—А–Є—Ж–∞—В–µ–ї—М–љ—Л–Љ, countInStock –Њ—В—А–Є—Ж–∞—В–µ–ї—М–љ—Л–Љ.
- `setImage(data)` –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ upload —Г—Б—В–∞–љ–∞–≤–ї–Є–≤–∞–µ—В –њ—Г—В—М –Ї –Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–ґ–µ–љ–љ–Њ–Љ—Г —Д–∞–є–ї—Г; –њ—А–Є —Б–∞–±–Љ–Є—В–µ —Д–Њ—А–Љ—Л –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В—Б—П —Н—В–Њ—В –њ—Г—В—М.
- –Х—Б–ї–Є –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–Є—В—М URL –≤—А—Г—З–љ—Г—О –Є —В–∞–Ї–ґ–µ –Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Є—В—М —Д–∞–є–ї вЖТ –њ–Њ–±–µ–і–Є—В –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ–і–љ–µ–µ –і–µ–є—Б—В–≤–Є–µ.
- `uploading=true` –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В Loader, –±–ї–Њ–Ї–Є—А—Г–µ—В UX –≤–Њ –≤—А–µ–Љ—П upload.
- `PRODUCT_UPDATE_RESET` –і–Є—Б–њ–∞—В—З–Є—В—Б—П –њ—А–Є –≤—Е–Њ–і–µ –љ–∞ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Г –і–ї—П —Б–±—А–Њ—Б–∞ —Б—В–∞—А–Њ–≥–Њ success-—Д–ї–∞–≥–∞.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Product Detail action, Image Upload (Feature 7), Auth + admin.
- –Ю—В –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–µ–љ–Є–є –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б—П—В: –Ї–∞—В–∞–ї–Њ–≥, –і–µ—В–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж–∞, –Ї–∞—А—Г—Б–µ–ї—М (–µ—Б–ї–Є –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–Є–ї—Б—П —А–µ–є—В–Є–љ–≥).

---

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 5: Admin Product Delete

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–С–µ–Ј–≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—В–љ–Њ–µ —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞ –Є–Ј –±–∞–Ј—Л –і–∞–љ–љ—Л—Е. –Ґ—А–µ–±—Г–µ—В –њ–Њ–і—В–≤–µ—А–ґ–і–µ–љ–Є—П —З–µ—А–µ–Ј –±—А–∞—Г–Ј–µ—А–љ—Л–є –і–Є–∞–ї–Њ–≥. Persona: –∞–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А, —Г–±–Є—А–∞—О—Й–Є–є —Г—Б—В–∞—А–µ–≤—И–Є–є —В–Њ–≤–∞—А.

### User flow

1. –Т `ProductListScreen` вЖТ –Ї–ї–Є–Ї –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–Є Delete (–Є–Ї–Њ–љ–Ї–∞ –Љ—Г—Б–Њ—А–Ї–Є).
2. –С—А–∞—Г–Ј–µ—А–љ—Л–є `window.confirm('Are you sure')`.
3. –Я—А–Є –њ–Њ–і—В–≤–µ—А–ґ–і–µ–љ–Є–Є вЖТ `dispatch(deleteProduct(id))`.
4. –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–∞ —Б–њ–Є—Б–Њ–Ї –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–∞—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В—Б—П.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Action:** `deleteProduct(id)` вАФ DELETE `/api/products/:id` —Б Bearer token.
- **Controller:** `Product.findById(req.params.id)` вЖТ `product.remove()`.
- **`successDelete`** вЖТ –≤ useEffect ProductListScreen —В—А–Є–≥–µ—А–Є—В `listProducts` –њ–Њ–≤—В–Њ—А–љ–Њ.

### API endpoints

- `DELETE /api/products/:id` вАФ private + admin, response: `{ message: 'Product removed' }`.

### Edge cases

- –Ґ–Њ–≤–∞—А —Г–і–∞–ї—С–љ, –љ–Њ –Њ–љ –µ—Й—С –≤ —З—М–µ–є-—В–Њ –Ї–Њ—А–Ј–Є–љ–µ (localStorage) вЖТ –њ—А–Є checkout —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–µ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–∞ —Б –љ–µ—Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г—О—Й–Є–Љ product ID вЖТ Order —Б–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ–Є—В—Б—П –≤ –С–Ф (FK constraint –Њ—В—Б—Г—В—Б—В–≤—Г–µ—В –≤ MongoDB –њ–Њ —Г–Љ–Њ–ї—З–∞–љ–Є—О).
- –Ґ–Њ–≤–∞—А —Г–і–∞–ї—С–љ, –љ–Њ —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г—О—В –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј—Л —Б –љ–Є–Љ вЖТ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј—Л –љ–µ –ї–Њ–Љ–∞—О—В—Б—П (orderItems —Е—А–∞–љ–Є—В snapshot –і–∞–љ–љ—Л—Е).
- `window.confirm` –љ–µ –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –±—Л—В—М —Б—В–Є–ї–Є–Ј–Њ–≤–∞–љ –Є –±–ї–Њ–Ї–Є—А—Г–µ—В JS thread.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Product model, Admin auth.
- –Э–µ —Г–і–∞–ї—П–µ—В —Б–≤—П–Ј–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ –Є–Ј–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є—П –Є–Ј `/uploads/` –њ–∞–њ–Ї–Є.

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 6: Admin User List

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї–µ–є —Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ—Л —Б –Њ—В–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є–µ–Љ admin-—Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б–∞, –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞–Љ–Є —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П –Є —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є—П. Persona: super-admin, —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П—О—Й–Є–є –і–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–∞–Љ–Є.

### User flow

1. Admin –Њ—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `/admin/userlist` (Admin вЖТ Users).
2. –Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞: ID, NAME, EMAIL (–Ї–ї–Є–Ї–∞–±–µ–ї—М–љ—Л–є mailto), ADMIN (—З–µ–Ї–Љ–∞—А–Ї –Є–ї–Є X), –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–Є Edit/Delete.
3. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї ¬ЂEdit¬ї вЖТ `/admin/user/:id/edit`.
4. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї ¬ЂDelete¬ї вЖТ `window.confirm` вЖТ —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `UserListScreen.js` вАФ guard `userInfo.isAdmin`.
- **Actions:**
  - `listUsers()` вЖТ GET `/api/users` (all users).
  - `deleteUser(id)` вЖТ DELETE `/api/users/:id`.
- **Reducers:** `userListReducer`, `userDeleteReducer`.
- **`successDelete`** –≤ useEffect –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В—П—Е вЖТ –∞–≤—В–Њ–Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є—П.
- Admin-—Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б: –Є–Ї–Њ–љ–Ї–∞ `fa-check` –Ј–µ–ї—С–љ–∞—П –µ—Б–ї–Є isAdmin, `fa-times` –Ї—А–∞—Б–љ–∞—П –µ—Б–ї–Є –љ–µ—В.

### API endpoints

- `GET /api/users` вАФ private + admin, response: –Љ–∞—Б—Б–Є–≤ –≤—Б–µ—Е users (–≤–Ї–ї—О—З–∞—П password hash! вАФ security issue).
- `DELETE /api/users/:id` вАФ private + admin, response: `{ message: 'User removed' }`.

### Edge cases

- `GET /api/users` –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В password hash –≤ –Њ—В–≤–µ—В–µ (–Ї–Њ–љ—В—А–Њ–ї–ї–µ—А –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В `User.find({})` –±–µ–Ј `.select('-password')`) вАФ security issue —Г—З–µ–±–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –њ—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В–∞.
- Admin –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В —Г–і–∞–ї–Є—В—М —Б–∞–Љ–Њ–≥–Њ —Б–µ–±—П вЖТ –њ–Њ—В–µ—А—П –і–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–∞ –Ї —Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ–µ.
- –Э–µ—В –њ–Њ–і—В–≤–µ—А–ґ–і–µ–љ–Є—П email –њ—А–Є —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–Є.
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є—П `listUsers()` –≤—Л–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П –њ–Њ–≤—В–Њ—А–љ–Њ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј useEffect dependency.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: User model, Admin auth.
- –Ю—В —Н—В–Њ–є —Д–Є—З–Є –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В: User Edit (–њ–µ—А–µ—Е–Њ–і —З–µ—А–µ–Ј Edit button).

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 7: Admin User Edit

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–§–Њ—А–Љ–∞ —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П –і–∞–љ–љ—Л—Е –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П: –Є–Љ—П, email, admin-—Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б (checkbox). –Я–Њ–Ј–≤–Њ–ї—П–µ—В –≤—Л–і–∞–≤–∞—В—М –Є –Њ—В–Ј—Л–≤–∞—В—М admin-–њ—А–∞–≤–∞. Persona: super-admin.

### User flow

1. –Ю—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `/admin/user/:id/edit`.
2. –§–Њ—А–Љ–∞ –њ—А–µ–і–Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–∞: name, email, isAdmin checkbox.
3. –Ь–µ–љ—П–µ—В –і–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ.
4. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ—В ¬ЂUpdate¬ї.
5. –Я—А–Є —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–µ вЖТ —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В –љ–∞ `/admin/userlist`.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `UserEditScreen.js` вАФ 3 state –њ–µ—А–µ–Љ–µ–љ–љ—Л—Е: name, email, isAdmin.
- **Actions:**
  - `getUserDetails(userId)` вЖТ GET `/api/users/:id` (admin endpoint, –љ–µ `/profile`).
  - `updateUser({ _id, name, email, isAdmin })` вЖТ PUT `/api/users/:id`.
- **Reducer:** `userUpdateReducer` вАФ `{ loading, error, success }`.
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ `successUpdate` вЖТ `USER_UPDATE_RESET` + redirect –љ–∞ `/admin/userlist`.
- **–Ф–≤–Њ–є–љ–Њ–є –і–Є—Б–њ–∞—В—З –≤ action:** `USER_UPDATE_SUCCESS` + `USER_DETAILS_SUCCESS` (–Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В –Ї–µ—И–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ –і–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ) + `USER_DETAILS_RESET`.

### API endpoints

- `GET /api/users/:id` вАФ private + admin, response: user –±–µ–Ј –њ–∞—А–Њ–ї—П (`.select('-password')`).
- `PUT /api/users/:id` вАФ private + admin, body: `{ name, email, isAdmin }`, response: `{ _id, name, email, isAdmin }`.

### Edge cases

- Email –Љ–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–Є—В—М –љ–∞ —Г–ґ–µ —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г—О—Й–Є–є вЖТ MongoDB unique index –≤–µ—А–љ—С—В –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї—Г вЖТ HTTP 500 (–љ–µ –Њ–±—А–∞–±–Њ—В–∞–љ–Њ –Ї–∞–Ї 400).
- `isAdmin` –Љ–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ —Г—Б—В–∞–љ–Њ–≤–Є—В—М —З–µ—А–µ–Ј UI вАФ –љ–µ—В –і–Њ–њ–Њ–ї–љ–Є—В–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ–є –≤–µ—А–Є—Д–Є–Ї–∞—Ж–Є–Є.
- –Э–µ—В —Б–Љ–µ–љ—Л –њ–∞—А–Њ–ї—П —З–µ—А–µ–Ј admin-—А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ (–њ–Њ–ї–µ password –Њ—В—Б—Г—В—Б—В–≤—Г–µ—В –≤ —Д–Њ—А–Љ–µ).

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: User model, Admin auth.
- –Ш–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–µ–љ–Є–µ `isAdmin` –≤–ї–Є—П–µ—В –љ–∞: –і–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ –Ї admin-–њ–∞–љ–µ–ї–Є —З–µ—А–µ–Ј Header, API middleware `admin`.

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 8: Admin User Delete

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–£–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ –∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В–∞ –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П –Є–Ј —Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ—Л. –Т—Б–µ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј—Л –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П –Њ—Б—В–∞—О—В—Б—П –≤ –С–Ф (–љ–µ—В cascade delete). Persona: –∞–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Action:** `deleteUser(id)` вЖТ DELETE `/api/users/:id` —Б Bearer token.
- **Controller:** `User.findById(req.params.id)` вЖТ `user.remove()`.

### API endpoints

- `DELETE /api/users/:id` вАФ private + admin, response: `{ message: 'User removed' }`.

### Edge cases

- –£–і–∞–ї—С–љ–љ—Л–є –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М: –µ–≥–Њ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј—Л –Њ—Б—В–∞—О—В—Б—П (FK –љ–µ –Ї–∞—Б–Ї–∞–і–Є—А—Г–µ—В—Б—П). –Т OrderScreen populate(`'user', 'name email'`) –≤–µ—А–љ—С—В null вЖТ `order.user && order.user.name` –≤ OrderListScreen –Ј–∞—Й–Є—Й–∞–µ—В –Њ—В –Ї—А–∞—И–∞.
- Admin —Г–і–∞–ї—П–µ—В —Б–µ–±—П вЖТ —Б–ї–µ–і—Г—О—Й–Є–є –Ј–∞–њ—А–Њ—Б —Б –µ–≥–Њ —В–Њ–Ї–µ–љ–Њ–Љ –≤–µ—А–љ—С—В 401 (User –љ–µ –љ–∞–є–і–µ–љ –≤ protect middleware).

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: User model, Admin auth.
- –°–≤—П–Ј–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ Orders: –љ–µ —Г–і–∞–ї—П—О—В—Б—П, –Љ–Њ–≥—Г—В –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞—В—М null –і–ї—П user.

---

metadata.summary: –£–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ –∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В–∞ –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П –Є–Ј —Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ—Л. –Т—Б–µ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј—Л –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П –Њ—Б—В–∞—О—В—Б—П –≤ –С–Ф (–љ–µ—В cascade delete). Persona: –∞–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А.

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 9: Admin Order List

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–Њ–≤ –≤ —Б–Є—Б—В–µ–Љ–µ —Б –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Ж–Є–µ–є –Њ –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї–µ, –і–∞—В–µ, —Б—Г–Љ–Љ–µ, —Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б–µ –Њ–њ–ї–∞—В—Л –Є –і–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–Ї–Є. Persona: –∞–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А, –Њ—В—Б–ї–µ–ґ–Є–≤–∞—О—Й–Є–є –≤—Б–µ —В—А–∞–љ–Ј–∞–Ї—Ж–Є–Є.

### User flow

1. Admin вЖТ `/admin/orderlist` (Admin вЖТ Orders).
2. –Ґ–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞: ID, USER (–Є–Љ—П), DATE, TOTAL, PAID, DELIVERED, –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞ Details.
3. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї ¬ЂDetails¬ї вЖТ `/order/:id`.
4. –Э–∞ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж–µ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–∞ admin –≤–Є–і–Є—В –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї—Г ¬ЂMark As Delivered¬ї.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `OrderListScreen.js` вАФ guard `userInfo.isAdmin`.
- **Action:** `listOrders()` вЖТ GET `/api/orders`.
- **Reducer:** `orderListReducer` вАФ `{ orders, loading, error }`.
- **Controller:** `getOrders` вАФ `Order.find({}).populate('user', 'id name')`.
- PAID column: –і–∞—В–∞ –µ—Б–ї–Є –Њ–њ–ї–∞—З–µ–љ, –Є–љ–∞—З–µ `fa-times` –Ї—А–∞—Б–љ–∞—П.
- DELIVERED column: –∞–љ–∞–ї–Њ–≥–Є—З–љ–Њ.
- `order.user && order.user.name` вАФ null-safe –і–ї—П —Г–і–∞–ї—С–љ–љ—Л—Е –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї–µ–є.

### API endpoints

- `GET /api/orders` вАФ private + admin, response: –Љ–∞—Б—Б–Є–≤ –≤—Б–µ—Е –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–Њ–≤ —Б populated user (id + name).

### Edge cases

- –Ю—З–µ–љ—М –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–Њ–≤ вЖТ –±–µ—Б–Ї–Њ–љ–µ—З–љ–∞—П —В–∞–±–ї–Є—Ж–∞ (–љ–µ—В –њ–∞–≥–Є–љ–∞—Ж–Є–Є –≤ admin order list вАФ –≤ –Њ—В–ї–Є—З–Є–µ –Њ—В product list).
- `order.paidAt.substring(0, 10)` вАФ –≤—Л–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –њ—А–Є `order.isPaid` (ternary –Ј–∞—Й–Є—Й–∞–µ—В).
- `order.user` –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –±—Л—В—М null –µ—Б–ї–Є –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М —Г–і–∞–ї—С–љ вЖТ `order.user && order.user.name` –Њ—В–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–∞–µ—В undefined (–њ—Г—Б—В–∞—П —П—З–µ–є–Ї–∞).

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Order model, Auth + admin, User model (—З–µ—А–µ–Ј populate).
- –°—Б—Л–ї–∞–µ—В—Б—П –љ–∞: Order Detail (Feature 10).

---

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 10: Mark Order as Delivered

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–Р–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А –њ–Њ–Љ–µ—З–∞–µ—В –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј –і–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–љ—Л–Љ вАФ —Г—Б—В–∞–љ–∞–≤–ї–Є–≤–∞–µ—В `isDelivered=true` –Є `deliveredAt=Date.now()`. –Ъ–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞ –≤–Є–і–љ–∞ —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –і–ї—П –Њ–њ–ї–∞—З–µ–љ–љ—Л—Е –Є –µ—Й—С –љ–µ –і–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–љ—Л—Е –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–Њ–≤. Persona: –∞–і–Љ–Є–љ–Є—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А, –Њ–±—А–∞–±–∞—В—Л–≤–∞—О—Й–Є–є –≤—Л–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–љ—Л–µ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј—Л.

### User flow

1. Admin –Њ—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В OrderScreen –і–ї—П –Њ–њ–ї–∞—З–µ–љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –Ј–∞–Ї–∞–Ј–∞.
2. –Т–љ–Є–Ј—Г summary card вАФ –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞ ¬ЂMark As Delivered¬ї.
3. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї вЖТ `dispatch(deliverOrder(order))`.
4. –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–∞ вЖТ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж–∞ –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В—Б—П —Б `"Delivered on [date]"`.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **–£—Б–ї–Њ–≤–Є–µ —А–µ–љ–і–µ—А–∞ –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–Є:**
  ```jsx
  {userInfo && userInfo.isAdmin && order.isPaid && !order.isDelivered && (
    <Button onClick={deliverHandler}>Mark As Delivered</Button>
  )}
  ```
- **Action:** `deliverOrder(order)` вЖТ PUT `/api/orders/:id/deliver` (–њ—Г—Б—В–Њ–є body `{}`).
- **Reducer:** `orderDeliverReducer` вАФ `{ loading: loadingDeliver, success: successDeliver }`.
- **Controller:** `updateOrderToDelivered`:
  ```js
  order.isDelivered = true
  order.deliveredAt = Date.now()
  const updatedOrder = await order.save()
  ```
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ `successDeliver` вЖТ `useEffect` —Б–±—А–∞—Б—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `ORDER_DELIVER_RESET` + `getOrderDetails`.

### API endpoints

- `PUT /api/orders/:id/deliver` вАФ private + admin, body: `{}`, response: –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—С–љ–љ—Л–є order.

### Edge cases

- –Э–µ—В undo вАФ –і–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–Ї—Г –љ–µ–ї—М–Ј—П –Њ—В–Љ–µ–љ–Є—В—М —З–µ—А–µ–Ј UI.
- –Ъ–љ–Њ–њ–Ї–∞ —Б–Ї—А—Л—В–∞ –њ—А–Є `!order.isPaid` вАФ –љ–µ–ї—М–Ј—П –њ–Њ–Љ–µ—В–Є—В—М –Ї–∞–Ї –і–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–Њ –і–Њ –Њ–њ–ї–∞—В—Л.
- `loadingDeliver && <Loader />` –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П –њ–Њ–Ї–∞ –Ј–∞–њ—А–Њ—Б –≤ –њ—А–Њ—Ж–µ—Б—Б–µ.
- Route —В–Є–њ–Є–Ј–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ –Ї–∞–Ї GET –≤ –Ї–Њ–љ—В—А–Њ–ї–ї–µ—А–µ-–Ї–Њ–Љ–Љ–µ–љ—В–∞—А–Є–Є (`@route GET`), –љ–Њ –≤ —А–Њ—Г—В–µ—А–µ вАФ `PUT` (–љ–µ—Б–Њ–Њ—В–≤–µ—В—Б—В–≤–Є–µ –≤ –і–Њ–Ї—Г–Љ–µ–љ—В–∞—Ж–Є–Є –Ї–Њ–і–∞).

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: Order model, Admin auth, Payment (isPaid –і–Њ–ї–ґ–µ–љ –±—Л—В—М true).
- –Т–ї–Є—П–µ—В –љ–∞: Order History (deliveredAt –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П –≤ –њ—А–Њ—Д–Є–ї–µ), Admin Order List.

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 11: Image Upload for Products

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–Ч–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–∞ –Є–Ј–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є—П —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј —Д–Њ—А–Љ—Г –љ–∞ –Ї–ї–Є–µ–љ—В–µ вАФ —Б–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ—П–µ—В—Б—П –≤ –њ–∞–њ–Ї—Г `uploads/` –љ–∞ —Б–µ—А–≤–µ—А–µ. –Т–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В –њ—Г—В—М –Ї —Д–∞–є–ї—Г, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–є –Ј–∞–њ–Є—Б—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П –≤ –њ–Њ–ї–µ `image`. Persona: –Ї–Њ–љ—В–µ–љ—В-–Љ–µ–љ–µ–і–ґ–µ—А, –і–Њ–±–∞–≤–ї—П—О—Й–Є–є —Д–Њ—В–Њ —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞.

### User flow

1. –Э–∞ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж–µ —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞ вАФ –њ–Њ–ї–µ Image: —В–µ–Ї—Б—В–Њ–≤—Л–є input + file picker.
2. Admin –Ї–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ—В ¬ЂChoose File¬ї, –≤—Л–±–Є—А–∞–µ—В JPG/JPEG/PNG.
3. –Э–µ–Љ–µ–і–ї–µ–љ–љ–Њ (onChange) вЖТ `uploadFileHandler` –Њ—В–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П–µ—В —Д–∞–є–ї.
4. –Я–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П Loader (`uploading=true`).
5. –°–µ—А–≤–µ—А –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В –њ—Г—В—М `/uploads/image-1234567890.jpg`.
6. `setImage(data)` вАФ –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В input –њ–Њ–ї—П Image.
7. Admin –≤–Є–і–Є—В –њ—Г—В—М –≤ –њ–Њ–ї–µ, –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –њ—А–Њ–і–Њ–ї–ґ–Є—В—М —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Handler –≤ ProductEditScreen:**
  ```js
  const uploadFileHandler = async (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0]
    const formData = new FormData()
    formData.append('image', file)
    setUploading(true)
    const { data } = await axios.post('/api/upload', formData, config)
    setImage(data)
    setUploading(false)
  }
  ```
- **Route:** `uploadRoutes.js` вАФ `POST /api/upload` вАФ `protect, admin, multer.single('image')`.
- **Multer config:**
  - `destination`: `uploads/` –њ–∞–њ–Ї–∞.
  - `filename`: `${file.fieldname}-${Date.now()}${ext}` (–љ–∞–њ—А–Є–Љ–µ—А `image-1714211234567.jpg`).
  - `fileFilter`: –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А—П–µ—В —А–∞—Б—И–Є—А–µ–љ–Є–µ (`.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.png`) –Ш MIME-—В–Є–њ (`image/jpeg`, `image/png`).
  - `limits.fileSize`: 2MB (2 * 1024 * 1024 bytes).
- **Response:** —Б—В—А–Њ–Ї–∞-–њ—Г—В—М `/${req.file.path}` (–љ–∞–њ—А–Є–Љ–µ—А `/uploads/image-123.jpg`).
- **Static serving:** `server.js` вАФ `app.use('/uploads', express.static(path.join(__dirname, '/uploads')))`.

### API endpoints

- `POST /api/upload` вАФ private + admin, Content-Type: multipart/form-data, field name: `image`, response: —Б—В—А–Њ–Ї–∞ –њ—Г—В–Є, HTTP 200.

text:
# Admin Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 11: Image Upload for Products

### Edge cases

- –§–∞–є–ї > 2MB вЖТ multer –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї—Г вЖТ `uploadFileHandler` catch вЖТ `setUploading(false)`, –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–∞ —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –≤ console (–љ–µ—В UI-–Њ—В–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–µ–љ–Є—П upload error).
- –Э–µ–њ–Њ–і–і–µ—А–ґ–Є–≤–∞–µ–Љ—Л–є —В–Є–њ (GIF, WebP) вЖТ `fileFilter` –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞–µ—В –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї—Г `"Images only (jpg, jpeg, png)"` вЖТ —В–Њ –ґ–µ –њ–Њ–≤–µ–і–µ–љ–Є–µ.
- –Ф–≤–Њ–є–љ–∞—П –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–Ї–∞: —А–∞—Б—И–Є—А–µ–љ–Є–µ + MIME вАФ –Ј–∞—Й–Є—Й–∞–µ—В –Њ—В –њ–µ—А–µ–Є–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П —Д–∞–є–ї–∞ —Б –њ–Њ–і–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–є —А–∞—Б—И–Є—А–µ–љ–Є—П.
- –§–∞–є–ї—Л –љ–µ —Г–і–∞–ї—П—О—В—Б—П –њ—А–Є —Г–і–∞–ї–µ–љ–Є–Є —В–Њ–≤–∞—А–∞ вАФ –љ–∞–Ї–∞–њ–ї–Є–≤–∞—О—В—Б—П –≤ `uploads/`.
- –Т `uploadFileHandler` —В–Њ–Ї–µ–љ –њ–Њ–ї—Г—З–∞–µ—В—Б—П –Є–Ј `store.getState()` –љ–∞–њ—А—П–Љ—Г—О вАФ –љ–µ—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞—А—В–љ—Л–є –њ–∞—В—В–µ—А–љ (–Њ–±—Л—З–љ–Њ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј useSelector).
- `Form.File` (Bootstrap 4 API) вАФ —Г—Б—В–∞—А–µ–≤—И–Є–є –Ї–Њ–Љ–њ–Њ–љ–µ–љ—В –≤ React Bootstrap v2.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: `multer` npm package, `uploads/` –њ–∞–њ–Ї–∞ –љ–∞ —Б–µ—А–≤–µ—А–µ, Admin auth.
- –†–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В—Б—П –≤: Product model `image` field, –њ—Г–±–ї–Є—З–љ—Л–є –Ї–∞—В–∞–ї–Њ–≥, –і–µ—В–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж–∞.

–Я–Њ–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В –∞—Г—В–µ–љ—В–Є—Д–Є–Ї–∞—Ж–Є—О, —А–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–∞—Ж–Є—О, —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є–µ –њ—А–Њ—Д–Є–ї–µ–Љ –Є –Љ–µ—Е–∞–љ–Є–Ї—Г JWT-—Б–µ—Б—Б–Є–є.

text:
# Auth Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 1: User Login (Sign In)

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–Р—Г—В–µ–љ—В–Є—Д–Є–Ї–∞—Ж–Є—П —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г—О—Й–µ–≥–Њ –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П –њ–Њ email + password. –Ґ–Њ—З–Ї–∞ –≤—Е–Њ–і–∞ –і–ї—П –≤—Б–µ—Е –Ј–∞—Й–Є—Й—С–љ–љ—Л—Е –Љ–∞—А—И—А—Г—В–Њ–≤. Persona: –њ–Њ–Ї—Г–њ–∞—В–µ–ї—М, –≤–µ—А–љ—Г–≤—И–Є–є—Б—П –љ–∞ —Б–∞–є—В.

### User flow

1. –Я–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М –Њ—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `/login` (–Є–ї–Є –µ–≥–Њ —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В–Є—В —Б –Ј–∞—Й–Є—Й—С–љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –Љ–∞—А—И—А—Г—В–∞).
2. –Т–≤–Њ–і–Є—В email –Є password –≤ —Д–Њ—А–Љ—Г.
3. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ—В ¬ЂSign In¬ї.
4. –Я—А–Є —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–µ вАФ —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В –љ–∞ `redirect` query-–њ–∞—А–∞–Љ–µ—В—А (–µ—Б–ї–Є –µ—Б—В—М) –Є–ї–Є –љ–∞ `/`.
5. –Я—А–Є –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–µ вАФ –Њ—В–Њ–±—А–∞–ґ–∞–µ—В—Б—П `<Message variant='danger'>` —Б —В–µ–Ї—Б—В–Њ–Љ –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–Є.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `LoginScreen.js` вАФ –ї–Њ–Ї–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є state `email`, `password`; —З–Є—В–∞–µ—В `location.search` –і–ї—П redirect-–њ–∞—А–∞–Љ–µ—В—А–∞.
- **Action:** `userActions.login(email, password)` вАФ POST `/api/users/login`, –њ—А–Є —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–µ —Б–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ—П–µ—В `userInfo` –≤ `localStorage`.
- **Reducer:** `userLoginReducer` вАФ —Б–Њ—Б—В–Њ—П–љ–Є—П `USER_LOGIN_REQUEST`, `USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS`, `USER_LOGIN_FAIL`.
- **Redux state:** `state.userLogin.userInfo` вАФ –Њ–±—К–µ–Ї—В `{ _id, name, email, isAdmin, token }`.
- **Route:** `POST /api/users/login` вЖТ `authUser` controller.
- **Controller:** `authUser` вАФ `User.findOne({ email })`, `user.matchPassword(password)` (bcrypt.compare), –≥–µ–љ–µ—А–Є—А—Г–µ—В JWT —З–µ—А–µ–Ј `generateToken`.

### API endpoints

- `POST /api/users/login` вАФ body: `{ email, password }`, response: `{ _id, name, email, isAdmin, token }`.

### Edge cases

- –Э–µ–≤–µ—А–љ—Л–є email –Є–ї–Є password вЖТ HTTP 401 + `"Invalid email or password"`.
- –Я–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М –љ–µ –љ–∞–є–і–µ–љ –≤ MongoDB вЖТ —В–∞ –ґ–µ –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–∞ (–љ–µ —А–∞–Ј–≥–ї–∞—И–∞–µ—В—Б—П, –Ї–∞–Ї–Њ–≥–Њ –њ–Њ–ї—П –љ–µ—В).
- –§–Њ—А–Љ–∞ –±–µ–Ј email-—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—В–∞ вАФ –±—А–∞—Г–Ј–µ—А–љ–∞—П –≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П (type='email').
- –£–ґ–µ –Ј–∞–ї–Њ–≥–Є–љ–µ–љ (`userInfo` –≤ state) вАФ `useEffect` —Б—А–∞–Ј—Г –і–µ–ї–∞–µ—В `history.push(redirect)`, —Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞ –љ–µ –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—В—Б—П.
- –°–µ—В—М –љ–µ–і–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–љ–∞ вАФ action –ї–Њ–≤–Є—В `error.message` –Є –і–Є—Б–њ–∞—В—З–Є—В `USER_LOGIN_FAIL`.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: User model (MongoDB), bcrypt hashing –њ—А–Є —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–Є –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—П, `JWT_SECRET` env var.
- –Ю—В —Н—В–Њ–є —Д–Є—З–Є –Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б—П—В: Cart checkout (—А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В `/login?redirect=shipping`), Profile, –≤—Б–µ Admin-—Н–Ї—А–∞–љ—Л.

text:
# Auth Features вАФ ProShop MERN > Feature 2: User Registration (Sign Up)

### –Э–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–µ–љ–Є–µ

–°–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–µ –љ–Њ–≤–Њ–≥–Њ –∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В–∞. –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ —Г—Б–њ–µ—И–љ–Њ–є —А–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–∞—Ж–Є–Є –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–∞—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є –Ј–∞–ї–Њ–≥–Є–љ–µ–љ вАФ –љ–µ –љ—Г–ґ–љ–Њ –і–µ–ї–∞—В—М –Њ—В–і–µ–ї—М–љ—Л–є login-–Ј–∞–њ—А–Њ—Б. Persona: –љ–Њ–≤—Л–є –њ–Њ–Ї—Г–њ–∞—В–µ–ї—М.

### User flow

1. –Ю—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ—В `/register` (–Є–ї–Є –њ–Њ —Б—Б—Л–ї–Ї–µ ¬ЂNew Customer? Register¬ї —Б–Њ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Л –ї–Њ–≥–Є–љ–∞).
2. –Ч–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ—П–µ—В: Name, Email Address, Password, Confirm Password.
3. –Ъ–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ—В ¬ЂRegister¬ї.
4. –Х—Б–ї–Є passwords –љ–µ —Б–Њ–≤–њ–∞–і–∞—О—В вАФ –ї–Њ–Ї–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–∞ `"Passwords do not match"` –±–µ–Ј –Њ–±—А–∞—Й–µ–љ–Є—П –Ї API.
5. –Я—А–Є —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–µ вАФ JWT –њ–Њ–ї—Г—З–µ–љ, `userInfo` –Ј–∞–њ–Є—Б–∞–љ –≤ localStorage, —А–µ–і–Є—А–µ–Ї—В –љ–∞ `redirect` –Є–ї–Є `/`.

### –Ґ–µ—Е–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є impl

- **Screen:** `RegisterScreen.js` вАФ 4 –њ–Њ–ї—П state + `message` –і–ї—П –ї–Њ–Ї–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–є –≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є–Є –њ–∞—А–Њ–ї–µ–є.
- **Action:** `userActions.register(name, email, password)` вАФ POST `/api/users`, –њ—А–Є —Г—Б–њ–µ—Е–µ –і–Є—Б–њ–∞—В—З–Є—В `USER_REGISTER_SUCCESS` + `USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS` (–і–≤–Њ–є–љ–Њ–є –і–Є—Б–њ–∞—В—З = auto-login).
- **Reducer:** `userRegisterReducer` вАФ `USER_REGISTER_REQUEST/SUCCESS/FAIL`.
- **Controller:** `registerUser` вАФ –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А—П–µ—В `User.findOne({ email })`, —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞—С—В —З–µ—А–µ–Ј `User.create({ name, email, password })`, —Е–µ—И–Є—А—Г–µ—В –њ–∞—А–Њ–ї—М —З–µ—А–µ–Ј Mongoose pre-save hook.
- **Model pre-save hook:** `bcrypt.genSalt(10)` + `bcrypt.hash`.

### API endpoints

- `POST /api/users` вАФ body: `{ name, email, password }`, response: `{ _id, name, email, isAdmin, token }`, HTTP 201.

### Edge cases

- Email —Г–ґ–µ –Ј–∞–љ—П—В вЖТ HTTP 400 + `"User already exists"`.
- Passwords –љ–µ —Б–Њ–≤–њ–∞–і–∞—О—В вЖТ —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ —Д—А–Њ–љ—В–Њ–≤–∞—П –Њ—И–Є–±–Ї–∞, –Ј–∞–њ—А–Њ—Б –љ–µ –Њ—В–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П–µ—В—Б—П.
- –Я—Г—Б—В—Л–µ –њ–Њ–ї—П вАФ –±—А–∞—Г–Ј–µ—А–љ–∞—П –≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П HTML required-–∞—В—А–Є–±—Г—В–Њ–≤ –Њ—В—Б—Г—В—Б—В–≤—Г–µ—В (–њ–Њ–ї—П –±–µ–Ј required); MongoDB Schema `required: true` –≤–µ—А–љ—С—В 400.
- –Я–∞—А–Њ–ї—М –љ–µ —Е–µ—И–Є—А—Г–µ—В—Б—П –њ–Њ–≤—В–Њ—А–љ–Њ: pre-save hook –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А—П–µ—В `this.isModified('password')`.

### –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В–Є

- –Ч–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є—В –Њ—В: User model, bcrypt, `generateToken`.
- –Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ —А–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–∞—Ж–Є–Є –њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞—В–µ–ї—М –Є–Љ–µ–µ—В `isAdmin: false` –њ–Њ —Г–Љ–Њ–ї—З–∞–љ–Є—О.
